chapters.text: Ahab thi nungin Moab gam miten jong Israel dou nan gal ahinbol tauve.

Ahazi’ah kitipa hi Samaria khopia aindan chung nung kalbi leiya alhan, anatlo tai; hijeh chun Ahazi’ah kitipa hin sottolle mi asol’in ajah-uva hitin aseitai, “Cheuvin lang Ekron kho mite hou adoiyu Ba’al-zebub kiti henga chun phun neigasan peh tauvin, hiche kanatna kona hi damdoh ding kahi hinam, damdoh lou ding kahim,” tin asol tai.

Ahin hichea hin Pakai Vantil chun Tishbe khoa mi Elijah jah a aseiyin, “Kipatdoh loiyin lang Samaria lengpa sottolle miho khu kimupin lang chule ajah-uva aseipeh loiyin, ‘Israelte lah a Pathen umlouhel hitam, nangho pi hi Ekron kho mite doihou Ba’al-zebub henga phunsan dinga nacheu hi?’ tin phoh-in.
Hichejeh hin Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nangma nalupna jalkhuna kona nahung kumlhah kit louhel ding, nathiden tei tei ding ahitai,’ tin aseiye nati diu ahi, tin seipeh-in tin.” ati. Elijah chu achetai.
Chuphat’in sottolle ho chu lengpa henga ahung kile kit’uvin ahileh aman ajah-uva anadongin, “Ipi bola hung kile kit nahiu hitam?” anati.

Sottolle hon jong lengpa jah a aseiyun, “Keiho toh kimuto din pasal khat ahungin keiho jah a hi tin aseiye, ‘Nahinsol pau lengpa henga chun nung che kit’uvin, ajah a hitin gasei tauvin, Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; Israelte lah a Pathen beihel hitam, nangman Ekron kho mite doihou Ba’al-zebub henga phunsan dinga mi nahinsol jeng hi? Hiche naboljeh a hi nalupna jalkhun chunga kona hung kumlha kit louhela nathiden tei tei ding ahi, ‘tin aseiye ahung tin ahi,’ atiuve.
Lengpan jong amaho jah a adongin, “Naheng uva hung nangho toh kimuto dia hungpa, hitobang bang thu naseipeh pau chu itobanga kivon mi ham?” atileh;
amahon jong lengpa chu adonbut’uvin, “Ama chun samul pon akisil’in, akonga savun konggah akichen’e,” atiuvin ahi. Chuphat’in lengpa’n jong aseiyin, “Tishbe khoa mi Elijah hichu men,” ati.

Hichun lengpa’n jong Elijah koma din sepai som nga lamkai khat leh asepaite mi som nga chu asol than ahi. Sepai lamkaipa chu molvuma toupa Elijah henga chun achetoupeh tan, chule ajah a agaseiye, “Vo Pathen mipa, lengpa’n ‘Hung kum lhan’ tin aseiye,” agati.

Ahivangin Elijah chun sepai som nga lamkaipa chu adonbut’in, “Kei hi Pathen mi kahiya ahileh, van a konin meikong hung leng lha hen lang nang le nasepai mi som nga chu nakavam jengu hen,” atin ahileh; van a konin meikong ahung leng lha pai jengin alamkaipa leh sepai som nga chu ahalvam hel jeng tai.

Lengpan sepai som nga lamkai khat le asepaite som nga ma asol thah beh kit’in ahi. Sepai lamkaipa jong chu akaltou kit’in Elijah jah a agasei kit’e, “Vo Pathen mipa, lengpa’n ‘Hung kumlha loi jeng hen,’ tin thu ahinseiye,” agati kit’e.

Elijah chun adonbut’in miho jah a chun, “Kei hi Pathen mi kahiya ahileh, van a konin meikong hung leng lha hen lang nang le nasepai mi som nga chu nakavam jengu hen,” ati kit’in ahileh; van a konin meikong ahung leng lha pai jengin alamkaipa leh sepai som nga chu ahalvam hel jeng tai.

Ahivangin lengpa’n athumvei lhin na geiyin sepai som nga lamkai khat leh asepai som nga ma asol kit nalaiye. Athumvei lhin na sepai lamkaipa jong chu akaltou kit’in, ahivangin amapa hi Elijah angsunga adilsun, ahenga ataovin, “Vo Pathen mipa, nahenga katao ahi, keima hinkho leh hiche kasepai som nga, nasohte hinkho hi manlu tah din neigel pehuvin lang sumang hih hel’in.

Vetan, sepai loi lamkai masa teni chu asepai lhon som nga cheng cheh chutoh van a kona meikong hung leng lha chun akavam gamtauvin ahi; hijeh chun tun vang nangma mitmun keima hinkho hi manlu tah-in neigel peh-in lang sumang hih beh-in,” atin athumtai.

Hichea hin Pakai Vantil jong chun Elijah jah a aseiyin, “Hichepa hitoh kilhonsuh tan, kicha ta hih beh-in,” atitai. Hijeh chun Elijah jong akipatdoh jengin sepai lamkaipa chutoh lengpa henga din akilhonsuh pai lhon tai.

chujongle Elijah chun lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nangman Ekron kho mite doi hou Ba’alzebuh henga phunsan dia mi nahinsol jengpi chu, Israelte lah a Pathen beihela hita a hitobang doi kihou hi doh ding nati hitam? Hiche naboljeh a hi nangma nalupna jalkhuna kona nahung kumlhah kit louhel ding, thonmoa nathiden tei tei ding ahi,’ tin aseitai,” ati.

Elijah kitipan Pakai thusei aseipeh dungjuiyin lengpa chu athiden tai. Chujouvin Ahazi’ah kitipa hin chapa anei loujeh-in, Judah gam lengpa Jehoshaphat chapa Jeho’ram kitipa leng chan kal kum ni lhin kumin Ahazi’ah sopipa Jeho’ram chun Ahazi’ah khel’in lengvai apotai.
Ahazi’ah thilbol anatoh, athilbol adang dang aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh kei hilou ham?
Pakaiyin Elijah themgao chu van chung lama chimpeiya apeitou kon chun Elijah le Elisha hi Gilgal khoa konin lampi khat’a ahung kilhon khom lhonin ahi.

Chuin Elijah chun Elisha jah a aseiyin, “Lungset tah-in hikoma hin hung kho ngai tan, keivang Bethel geiya che din Pakaiyin eisol’e,” ati. Ahinla Elisha’n aseipai jengin, “Hing jing Pakai min le nangma hinlai sunga kasei ahi, keiman nang nadalha hih hel inge,” atitai. Hijeh chun Elijah le Elisha chu anigel’in Bethel geiyin achesuh lhon tai.

Hichun Bethel khoa chenga themgaoho chapate chu Elisha henga ahunguvin ajah a ahung seitauve, “Napupa hi tuni nikhoa Pakaiyin nachung lama alahtou ding ahitai. ti hi nangman nahet hitam?” ahung tiuve. Elisha’n jong aseiyin, “Henge, kahenai; hijongle lung mongin um maiyun,” ati.

Elijah hin Elisha henga aseiyin, “Elisha, lungset tah-in hikoma hin umden tan; keivang Pakaiyin Jericho kho geiya che din eisol nalaiye,” ati kit tai. Ahivangin Elisha’n asei pai kit’ in, “Hing jing Pakai min le nangma hinlai sunga kasei ahi, kenvang nadalha hih hel inge,” ati kit leuve. Hijeh chun anigel lhonin Jericho kho geiyin ahung kit lhon tan ahi.

Jericho khoa cheng themgaoho chapaten jong Elisha hi ahin nailut kit’uvin ajah a asei kit’uve, “Napupa hi tuni nikhoa Pakaiyin nachung lama alahtou ding ahitai, ti nangman nahet hitam?” ahung ti kit’uvin ahileh; aman jong adonbut’in, “Henge, kahenai; hijongle lung mongin um maiyuvin” atipeh kit’e.

Chujouvin jong Elijah hin Elisha jah a asei kit tan, “Lungset tah-in hikoma hin hung umden tan; keivang Pakaiyin Jordan vadunga che din eisol nalaiye,” ati kit leuvin ahi. Ahivangin Elisha’n jong, “Hing jing Pakai min le nangma hinlai sunga kasei ahi, kenvang nangma nadalha hih hel inge,” atin; hijeh chun amani ma ma chu akilhon pai pai kit lhontai.
Hichea hin themgaoho chapate jeng jong mihem som nga jen akilhon’uvin, Elijah le Elisha Jordan vadung panga adin pet lhon chun amaho jong amani chutoh phabep khat kikah bep hin adinguve.
Hichun Elijah hin aponsil chu ajeltomin Jordan twipi ajep’a ahileh. twipi chu alang langa akiting tan jengin, amani chu tolgo lah a akijot galkai masangse lhonin akiting den jenge.

Agalkai lhon phat’in Elijah chun Elisha adongin, “Nakoma kona chung lama lahtouva ka um masang hin ipi pi nathum nom um am, thum jengin,” atin ahi. Elisha’n adonbut pai jengin, “Nahenga katao ahiye, nangma chan Lhagao jat hi jat nia tamjo neichansah tei teiyin,” ati.

Hichea hin Elijah chun ajah a aseiyin, “Nangin thil hahsa tah khat nathum jenge; hijongleh ijemtia keima hi nakoma kona lahtouva ka-umpet tah namua ahileh nang dinga chuti chu hijeng thei ahinai; amavang lahtouva kaumpet chu neimu louva ahivangleh nasei bang chu hithei lou ding ahitai,” atipeh-e.

Hitia hi amani chu akijotjot lai lhon tah hin kihoulimto thoa ache che lhona ahileh, vetan, meikonga hung leng kangtalai khat le sakolte ahung leng lhan amani chu achom chomin ahinsep khen del lhon tai. Hichun Elijah hi vanlaijola chimpeiyin apeitoupeh tan ahi.

Elisha’n hiche hi amudoh phat’in akap jah jengin, “Hepa, hepa! Israelte kangtalai ho leh asakolte pi khu!” atin ahi. Chujou kal’in amu kit tapoi. Chujouvin Elisha hin ama ponsil chu asut lhan abottel jengin keh ni ason ahi.
Elisha chun achunga hung leng lha Elijah ponsil chu akilah-in, anung che kit’in Jordan vadung panga ading tai.

Hichea hin Elisha’n achunga hung leng lha Elijah ponsil chu alan, twipi chu ajep’in hitin aseiye, “Pakai Elijah Pathen chu hoiya um nahim?” atia ahileh; hitia Elisha’n twipi aden phat chun twipi alang langa akikhenton, Elisha jong agalkai kit tan ahi.

Jericho khopia cheng themgaoho chapaten Elisha hi agah galmu phat’uvin akihouvun, “Elijah lhagao chu Elisha chunga pansa kit ahitai,” atiuve. Chuin amaho hi ahunguvin Elisha angsunga chun tola aboh khup cheh uvin ahi.

Chujongle amaho hin aseiyun, “Vetan, nasohte keiho hin pasal hat cheh som nga jen kaneiyuve, amaho khu cheu hen lang napupa chu gakhol tem’uhen; ijem itileh Elijah chu Pakai Lhagaovin alhoh doh a molsang vum dung khat touva alelhah jeng thei jong ahi, ahilou jongleh phaicham dung khat’a jong ale-lha thei ahi,” atiuve.

Amahon ano no jeng phat’uvin ama jong ajachat manin ajah uva, “Sol tauvin,” a tilo’n ahi. Hijeh chun amahon pasal hat cheh mi som nga chu asol’uvin ahileh, amahon nithum sungin Elijah chu ahol hol jenguvin, mu la amudoh joudeh tapouve.
Elisha chu Jericho khopia ana nichon petma man mi som nga chu ahung kile kit’uvin ahenga ahunguva ahileh, aman jong ajah-uva anaseiyin, “Najah-uva ‘Cheda tauvin,’ katipeh peh hilou ham?” anati.

Khopi sunga cheng mite chun Elisha jah a aseiyuvin, “Vetan, kapun namu bang hin hiche khopi hi aumdan anom lheh jengin, lung lhai a um jenge; ahinla twi ahah behseh jengin, hijeh chun lhoga lousoh imacha agamsunga hin apha thei hih beh jenge,” atiuvin ahi.
Hichun Elisha’n jong, “Twithol thah khat kahenga hinchoiyun lang, chutengleh asunga chun chi them khat koiyuvin,” atileh; amahon jong asei bangin ahenga ahinchoi lut pai jeng tauve.

Hichun Elisha jong achu twinah phung khat’a hin chi them khat agasep lhan aseitai, “Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, ‘Keiman hiche twi hi kasemphat ahitai, tua lhah a hiche twi hi akineh a kona thina umlou ding, mi alha lhing louva apengsol jong umlou ding ahitai,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pakai thusei Elisha’n asei dung juiyin tuni gei hin hiche twinah phunga twi hi apha jing jeng tan ahi.

Hichea kon hin Elisha chu Bethel khopi geiyin achetou paitai. Achetouva lampi dung agei pet hin khopi sunga konin chapang neocha cha phabep ahunguvin Elisha chu ahung tot thanguvin, ajah a hitin aseiyuve, “Chetou loi tang lutolpa, chetou loi tang lutolpa!” atiuve.

Hichun Elisha akiheiyin avetgola ahileh chapang ho chu amudoh-in, abonchan Pakai min apanin agaosap tai. Chutah chun gammang thing lah a konin savom api ni ahung lhaidoh paiyin chapang neoho phabep, mi som li le nijen athat’in, abottel dih deh jenge.
Hikoma kon hin Elisha chu Carmel molsang lama achetou pai kit’in, Carmel molsanga kon chun Samaria khopi lama ahung kile pai pai kit tai.
Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat leng chan kal kum som le kum get lhin kumin Ahab chapa Jeho’ram hin Samaria khopia chun Israelte chunga lengvai ahinpo pan in ahi; kum som le kum ni sungin lengvai anapoi.

Jeho’ram jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in, ahivangin anu le apa tobang lomin vang achonse behseh hih nai; ajeh chu apan Ba’al doi houna dinga khomol’a mol-khom aphusa jong abotdoh jengin ahi.
Ahivangin ama jong vang Nebat chapa Jerobo’am in Israelte achonset sahna, hiche chonsetna chunga hin alung lut den kit’in ahi; hitobanga Jerobo’am thilse bolna a kon hin akihei mang deh pon ahi.

Hichelaiya Moab lengpa Mesha kitipa hi kelngoi vul, kelngoiya hing mi khat anahi; hijeh a chu ama hin kumseh leh Israel lengpa henga kelngoi sang jakhat anapeh jing jenga, kelngoichal sang jakhat ma chu amul apeh ji ahi.
Ahin Ahab thi nungin Moab lengpa’n Israel lengpa dou nan gal ahinbol tai.
Hijeh chun Jeho’ram lengpa jong Samaria khopia konin akitoldoh pai pai jengin, hichelai hin Israel mite asimtoh tai.

Jeho’ram hi achen Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat henga mi asol’in thu athot tai, “Moab lengpa’n keima dou nan gal ahung boltai, hijeh a hi nang jong keima panpi dia nahunga Moab gal neihung sat hu lou ding ham?” agati sah-in ahi. Hichea chun Jehoshaphat chun ahinseiyin. ‘Hung kon nange; kei le nang tha khat ihin, kamite le namite jong tha khat ahiuvin, nasakol jouse le kei sakol jouse jong tha khat ahihouve, achom aumpoi,” ati.
Chujongle Jehoshaphat chun adongin, “Hoiche lampi pen a hi ikitol diu ham?” atia ahileh; Jeho’ram hin adonbut’in, “Edom gamsunga gammang lamlena ikitol diu ahi,” ati.

Hitobang hin Israel lengpa chu Judah lengpa chutoh agal kon lhontan, Edom lengpa jong gal ahung kontai. Amaho hi ni sagi sungin avel vel’in akitol tol jenguvin ahileh, akhon khon nan sepaite le akilhonpiu ganchate dingin don ding twi abeitai.
Chutah chun Israel lengpa’n jong aseitai, “Ohe, Pakaiyin hiche leng mi thum ho hi Moab mite khut’a pehdoh dinga eikou khomu ahitai ong!” atitai.

Ahivangin Jehoshaphat chun aseiyin, “Pakaiyin itobanga thu asei ding ham, tia idoh theiyu hikoma hi Pakai themgao khat beh um lou ham?” atia ahileh; Israel lengpa sepaite lah a mi khat chun ahindonbut paiyin, “Elijah khut’a twi sung lhapa, Shaphat chapa Elisha kitipa chu hikoma hin aum nai,” ati.
Hichun Jehoshaphat’in jong aseiyin, “Elisha henga hi Pakaiyin thu aseiji ahi,” atitai. Hijeh chun Israel lengpa le Jehoshaphat toh chule Edom lengpa chu Elisha henga achesuh cheh tauve.

Elisha hin Israel lengpa jah a anaseiyin, “Ken nang ipi kabolpeh ding nahim? Napa themgaote henga chen lang, nanu themgaote henga che jeng tang,” anati. Ahivangin Israel lengpa’n ajah a aseiyin, “Ahi hih beh-e; Pakaiyin hiche leng thum ho Moab mite khut’a peh doh dinga eikoukhom danu hitaleh akilomtai,” tin aseiye.

Hichun Elisha’n aseitai, “Keiman kahoujing thanei chungnung pen Pakai min a kasei ahi, Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat kakhohsah lou hileh keiman nang hi kamit kaleh jeng cha jong kavet lou ding, mu jong kamu khah lou ding nahi.
Ahivangin tu hin gosem sai them khat kahenga hin koulut tauvin,” ati. Chuin gosem saithempa chun gosem asai phat’in Elisha chunga Pakai khut ahung ki-ngam jengin ahi.
Chuphat’in Elisha’n jong aseitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Keiman hiche twi beina lhanghoh jouse hi dim kaveisah ding ahi,’ ati.

Chujongle Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nang hon hui le go nahet khah lou diu ahin, ahivanga hiche twi beina lhanghoh lam hi twi hung dimset jengin tin, nang hon jong nagancha jouseuvin jong hiche twi chu nadon cheh diu ahi,’ ati.
Hiche hi Pakai mitmua bol bailam thil neocha bou ahin, Pakaiyin Moab mite geiya nangho khut’a ahinpeh doh ding ahinalaiye;

chujongle nang hon kulpi kikaikhum khopi jouse jong najouva, khopi deilhen tah a kigel jong najo diu ahin, thing phung pha lai jouse lhuchap jengin tin, twinah jouse hung kangsoh keiyin tin, gam phalai chengse jong hol-lei hung soh gam ding ahi,” ati.
Ajing jingkah kilhaina gantha phat donin vetan, Edom langa konin twipi ahung kitol tol jengin, gamsung chu twi adimhel kahsen ahung kitol tol tai.
Moab mite hin amaho toh kisat dingin leng thum jen ahung kontai, ti ajah doh phat’uvin gal manchah kipat thei jouse chu aneova pat alen geiyin akikou khomsoh keiyuvin gamgi langa ahung kigoltauve.
Jingkah a ajing thouva ahileh nisan twipi chung chu ahinkhon, Moab miten agal lam’uva twi chung chu avet’uva ahileh thisan bangin asan jeng jung jenge.

Hichun amahon jong aseiyuvin, “Hiche hi thisan mong mong ahihouve; leng thum ho chu amaho kisat’uva khat le khat kithat to touva hintante. Hijeh a chu tua hi Moab mite dinga thil kichom phat ahitai!” atiuve.

Ahinla Moab mite chu Israelte ngahmuna ahung lut’uva ahileh Israelte chu ahung kipatdoh paiyuvin Moab mite chu akisat piuvin, amasang uva ajam mang kahseuvin ano no jeng tauve; chule amano tei teiyun, achepum pum’uvin Moab mite chu athat that jenguve.

Hitobang hin Israelten khopi jouse ajousoh keiyun alehkhup hel’uvin, leimun phalai jousea jong song aselut peh-uvin songhum lah asopeh-uvin, aleimun pha laiho chu song chang dimset set’in asep lut tauve; twinah phung jouse asing hinguvin, thing phung pha lai jouse jong aphuh lhu uvin, Kirhar’eseth kiti laiya chu songhum jeng ahisah masang seuvin aboltauve; chujongle songboma song seje them mihon aumkim soh keiyun akhopi chu ajoutauvin ahi.

Moab lengpa’n aven ahileh gal kisat chu ama lama ahung kisat tan, ama ahindoi tai, ti amudoh phat’in chemjam them cheh sepai ja sagi jen akipuiyin atumkeh din achen, Edom lengpa heng ajonin anokhum tai; ahivangin amaho jong hin ajou tapouve.

Chutah chun Moab lengpa’n achapa apeng masa atahpen pa chu amanin ama khel’a lengvaipoa pang ding pa chu, palvuma chun pumgo thiltoa to din athat tai. Chutah chun Israelte chunga lunghanna ahung chun, hijeh chun amaho jong Moab lengpa koma konin akinung tol’uvin, amaho gamsunga ahung kile kit tauve.

Themgaoho chapate lah a pasal khat pa chu ajinu Elisha henga ahung kap jah jengin, “Nasohpa kajipa chu athitan, hijongle nangman nahetsa ahin, kajipa nasohpa chu Pakai ging tah mi anahi; chuti ahileh tu hin bat kaneipau chu ahungin kacha teni hi soh a kaidin ahung gotan ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Elisha’n jong amanu jah a chun, “Ipi nabolpeh leng natim, kajah a sei temin? na-insunga chu ipi naneiyam, neiseipeh temin ong?” tin adong tai. Hichun amanun jong aseitai, “Nasohnu keiman imacha dang kanei tapoi, ka-ina ima aumpoi thaotwi bel khatseh seh bou aume,” ati.
Chuphat’in Elisha’n jong aseiyin, “Polama chen lang naheng nakom mitea konin umkeo bel-keo lhomcha hilou, phabep pi gathum loiyin.

Chujou tengleh insunga lut paiyin lang nang le nachapa seh seh kotpi kikam khum lhonin umkeo bel-keo dunga chun thaotwi chu sung sung jengin lang, khat adim teng leh aban banin tungdoh paiyin hiti hin gabol tan,” ati.
Hijeh chun amanu jong apotdoh paiyin ama le achapa seh seh chu kotpi akikam khumin, amanun umkeo bel-keo dunga chun thaotwi alhei lhei jengin, mihon jong umkeo le bel-keo apeh be be jenguvin ahi.
Bel khat chu adim tengleh amanun achapa jah a chun, “Bel khat hinchoibe kit’in,” atijin ahi. Chujouvin achapan jong aseiyin, “Bel abeitai,” atia ahileh; thaotwi jong chu along kangin abeitan ahi.

Hichun amanu jong ahungin Elisha jah a ahung seiyin ahileh, aman jong aseipeh-in, “Chen lang thaotwi chu gajoh-in lang nabat jouse sadoh jengin, najoh moh chengse chu nang le nachapan naneh lhona hinna nanei khamset lhon nah lai ding ahi,” tin aseipeh tai.

Nikhat hi Elisha jong numei haotah khat chenna Shunem khopia chun achen ahileh, numei haotah nu hin Elisha chu an nedin asol’e. Hiche kal hin Elisha chu hiche lampia hi ahung tih tih hiche numei haotah nu in a hin neh le chah ahin kiholpa tei jin ahi.
Numeinu hin ajipa jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, eiho lampia hungpa jing jeng mipa khu Pathen mi mong mong ahi, tin keiman kahedoh tai.

Hijeh chun einin ama ding khun inchung indan chombeh khat sempeh hitin, abang jong getpeh ding, a-an neh na ding dokhang khat dopeh a, atouna ding thing chouki khat koipeh ding, chulengle thaomei khat jong koipeh a, jalkhun khat jong dopeh ding, chutileh eini henga ahung phat phat leh hiche indana chu ama pansa thei ahi,” ati.
Nikhat hi Elisha jong ahungin hiche indan sunga chun akihei lut’in asunga akicholdon ahi.
Hichun Elisha’n asohpa Geha’zi jah a chun, “Hiche Shu’nem numei nu khu gakou tan,” ati. Aman jong agakouvin ahileh, amanu jong Elisha angsunga ahung ding tai.

Hichun Elisha’n jong asohpa jah a aseiyin, “Tun amanujah a hin seipeh tan: Vetan, nangin keiho gel khoh nan hitobang genthei hijatpi hi nathoh jeng tai, ipi naki bolpeh a pha ham? Nang tha lhenga lengpa heng ham ahiloule sepai lamkaipa heng ham khat’a thu kaseipeh diu nahim?” tin adoh sah tai. Amanun adonbut’in, “Keikamite lah a cheng kahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Elisha hin asohpa jah a “Hiche nu hi ipiba kibolpeh thei ding hitam?” atia ahileh; Geha’zin adonbut’in, “Apha, chuti ahileh amanu chapa neilou ahin, ajipa jong hi atehse ahitai,” atin ahi.
Hichun Elisha’n, “Amanu chu gakou temin,” atitai. A soh pan amanu agakou phat’in, amanu jong chu kotpi phung dung lamlhah a chun ahung ding tai.

Hichun Elisha’n aseitan ahi, “Tulai phat don, khovei ahung lhun kit teng nangman chapa khat nakipom tei tei ding ahi,” atipeh-e. Ahivangin amanun adonbut’in, “Ahipoi, vo kapu Pathen mipa, najou ding nasohnu jah a hin neiseipeh datan,” ati.
Ahinla numeinu chun nao ahinvop paiyin ahung gaitan, Elisha’n amanujah a aseipeh bang bangin akhovei chuche phat hung lhun donin chapa khat ahing tai.
Naosen chu ahung khandoh phat’in nikhat hi chang-at ho lah a pang apa koma chun agachen ahi.
Naosen chun apa jah a aseiyin, “O kaden, kaluchang, kaluchang,” tia aseiya ahileh; apan jong asohpa jah a chun, “Anu koma pui loiyin,” tin asol tai.
Asohpan jong anao chu adomin naosen chu anu henga ahinpuiyin, naosen chu sunkim geiyin anu pheichunga atouve, chuin athi pai pai tan ahi.
Hichun amanun jong adomtouvin Pathen mipa lupna jalkhuna chun agalup sah-in, kotpi akam khumin apotdoh tan ahi.

Chujouvin amanun jong ajipa akouvin aseitai, “Soh ho khat le sangan ho khat pen pen hitoh neisol than lang, keima kinloi tah-in cheng ting, Pathen mipa henga gacheng ting, chule hung kile kit loi tange,” ati.
Ahin ajipan, “Ipi dinga tuni pen tah a nache jeng ding ham? Tuni lhathah nikho la hilouva, cholngah nikho beh jong hilouva chu?” ati. Ahivangin amanun, “I-thu umponte,” ati pai jenge.
Hiti hin amanun sangan chunga toumun akisem loiyin, asohpa jah a chun aseiyin, “Sangan hi til loi loi jengin, keiman kaseipeh louva ahileh kei gel khoh nan olche sah hih hel’in,” ati.

Hiti hin amanu chu akipatdoh tan, Carmel molsang chunga Pathen mipa henga ahung lhung tan ahi. Amanu ahung chu Pathen mipan agalmu phat’in asohpa Geha’zi jah a chun aseiyin, “Vetan, gal langa khun Shunem numei nu chu ahunge;

lhaijel’in lang amanu khu galamton, chule ajah a gadong tan, adam dama hinam: chule ajipa jong adama hinam, naosen jong chu adam hinam?” tin agasei sah tai. Ahin amanu chun adonbut’in, “Apha pha nai,” ati.

Ahinla amanu chu molsang chunga Pathen mipa heng ahung lhun phat’in akeng phang teni atuh chah jengin ahi. Hichun Geha’zi chu amanu sondoh dia ahunga ahileh, Pathen mipa Elisha’n ajadan, “Limsah datan, amanu hi lung gimtah a umah ahihouve: agentheina hi Pakaiyin kei jah a seipeh louva aim mang ahitai,” ati.
Chutah chun amanun aseiyin, “Keiman kapu nang koma chapa kanathum mong hinam? Neijou lhep hih-in, tia keiman kasei masah sa dem hilou ham?” atitai.

Hichun Elisha’n jong Geha’zi jah a, “Nakong kigah loiyin lang, keima tenggol hi kichoiyin cheloi jengin. Mihem khat tou namupa a ahijongle ama chu salam bolpa din jong got dan lang, min nangma nasalama ahijongleh limsah dan kinomle hih hel’in; hiche katenggol hi naosen maichanga ana jam loiyin,” ati.

Ahivangin naosen nu chun aseipai kittan, “Hing jing Pakai min le nangma dam lai sunga kasei ahi, keiman nang vang puilouvin nada lha hih hel inge,” ati. Hijeh chun Elisha jong akipat’in amanu nung ajui paitan ahi.

Geha’zi chu amasan, naosen maichanga chun tenggol chu anajam tai, ahivangin ahinna ding dola ahusa jong akijapon, melchih theina imacha jong ahung umdoh deh poi. Hichejeh hin Geha’zi jong ahung kile kit’in, Elisha ahung lamton ajah a aseipeh tai, “Naosen chu ahing dohpon, athoudoh deh tapoi,” ati.
Elisha hi insung ahung lhun phat’in ama jalkhun chunga naosen athisa anakijam chu amudoh tai.
Hijeh chun Elisha jong avah lut paiyin ama le naosen thisa seh seh chu kotpi akikam khumin, Pakaiya atao tai.

Hichea hin Elisha chu naosen chunga akaldoh-in, naosen kam le akam asuton, amit teni leh ama mit teni asuton, akhut teni leh ama khut teni jong akitosah-in, hitia hi achunga akijama ahileh, chuin naosen jong chu ati ahung lumdoh tai.

Chuin Elisha chu athoudoh kit’in, insunga chun vel khat’in agavah len, chuin akaltou kit’in naosen chunga chun agakijam kit leuvin ahileh: hichea hin naosen chu sagi vei jen ahung nah haiyin ahi: chujouvin naosen chun amit teni ahin hasah pai pai tai.

Chujouvin Elisha’n Geha’zi chu akouvin, “Shunem numeinu chu gakouvin,” tin aseitai. Hijeh chun Geha’zin jong amanu chu agakoutai. Hitia hi amanu chu Elisha heng ahung lhun phat’in Elisha’n jong aseiyin, “Nachapa kipuitan,” ati.
Chutah chun amanu ahungin Elisha keng phang tenia aboh khup jengin, to la amai asulut jeng tai; chujouvin amanun achapa chu akipuiyin apotdoh tan ahi.

Gamsunga kel lhah laiyin Elisha hi Gilgal lama ahung kit tai. Chuin themgao ho chapate chengse amasanga ahung kikhop phat’uvin Elisha’n jong asohpa jah a aseiyin, “Bel lenpa chu songin lang themgao ho neh ding hin anchim phabep hin honpeh-in,” ati.

Hichea hin alah-uva mi khat chu loujaova anche hol din avaikonin ahileh, gamlah a tulou lengpigui khat agamun, tulou lengpigui lah a konin a-angjang dimset’in aga ahinlouve; chuin ahung kile kit’ in hiche ho chu a-atpan panin, anchim ahonna bel sunga chun alhah lut’in, ipi ahilam jong helouvin aume.

Chuin Themgao ho snh dia athuh peh-uva ahileh, anchim chu ahop phat’uvin amaho jong ahung pengjah jenguvin, “Vo Pathen mipa, hiche bel a hi thina an kihon ahihouve,” atitauve. Hitihin amahon anethei him him tapouve.

Hichun Elisha’n jong aseiyin, “Chuti ahileh an hindom tem ‘uvin,” atin; chuin bel sunga chun asep lut’in aseitai, “Miho neh din thuh peh tauvin, amahon nethei tauvin te,” atin, hiti hin abel sunga chun thina thei ima aumdeh tapon ahi.

Ba’al-shal’ishah khoa konin mi khat ahungin, Pathen mipa ding tin lhosoh masa leh sakol changa kisem changlhah pheng som ni toh, changthah toh asakhao sunga ahinpoh peh-in ahi. Hichun Elisha’n anaseiyin, “Hiche miho hin aneh diuvin petan,” ati.

Ahivangin asohpan anel’in, “Hichengseh a hi mihem ja khat jenpi hi iti kavah ding ham?” atia ahileh; Elisha’n jong avel sei kit’ in, “Hicheng hi miho hin aneh diuvin pen, ajeh chu Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Amaho hin aneh-uva aneh moh-u them khat jong valdoh nalai ding ahi, ‘tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in asohpan jong miho angsunga aluipeh tai. Amahon aneuvin, Pakai thusei dungjuiyin phabep jong ane-moh uvin ahi.

Syria lengpa sepai lamkaipa Na’aman kitipa hi apupa lengpa’n anajabol lheh jengin alung lhai lheh jenge, ijeh-inem itileh ama thahat jal’a Pakaiyin Syria mite gal ajosah ahi. Hiche sepai lamkai Na’aman hi galhang mihat tah ahin, amavang hi miphah khat ahiye.
Syria sepaiten agalbol nauva mi ahin mat nauva Israel gama konin nu-ngah neocha khat ahin kailut’uvin ahi, chule hiche nu-ngah neocha khat nu hi Na’aman jinu jenlen anapangin ahi.
Nungah nu hin apinu jah a aseiyin, “Kapu sepai lamkaipa hi Samaria khopia themgaopa koma cheng hitave leh, themgaopan ama hi atiphah abol dam peh tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Na’aman jong apu lengpa henga alut’in, “Israel gama hung kikailut nu-ngah nu khun hitin thu aseiye,” agati.

Chuphat’in Syria lengpa’n jong aseiyin, “Ahile gache jengin, keiman Israel lengpa dingin lekha khat nathot peh nange,” ati. Hijeh chun Na’aman jong achen, dangka talent som khat toh apon, sana shekel sang gup jen toh apon, golvah von ponsil som khat toh apoi.

Na’aman hin Israel lengpa henga lekha thot chu ahinpo lut’in ahileh alekha chu hitin akisune, “Hiche lekha hi nahenga ahung kilhut tengleh, keiman kasepaipa Na’aman hi nahenga kahinsol ahi, ti anahen lang, chule atiphah hi naboldam peh ding deina kahinsol ahi, ti anahen,” tin akisunin ahi.

Israel lengpan lekha kithot chu asimdoh phat’in aponsiljouse abottel jengin aseitai, “Kei hi Pathen kahiya mi katha theiya chule kahinsah thei ding ham, hichepan kei boldam dinga kahenga miphah khat ahinsol jeng hi? Phaten kihet them’uvin lang ve cheh uvin, ama hin keitoh kinahna ding mai mai ahol ahihouve,” ati.

Israel lengpa’n aponsil jouse abottel soh tai, ti thusim Pathen mipa Elisha hin ajah doh phat’in lengpa henga mi asol’in hitin aga seisah-e, “Ipi dinga nangin naponsil jouse nabotel jeng ham? Amapa chu kei henga hinsoljeng tangem, Israelte lah a themgao khat achenge, ti hi aman kihetdoh naveh ta,” atin ahi.
Hijeh chun Na’aman jong chu asakolte leh akangtalai chengse chutoh ahung kitol paiyin Elisha kotpi phunga ading tai.

Hichun Elisha’n Na’aman henga sottolle mi khat asol’in hitin agasei sah tai, “Chen lang Jordan vadunga khun sagi vei gakiphum lut’in kisil theng le chun hung damin natin, natahsa jong thengsel ding ahitai,” agatisah-e.

Hichea hin Na’aman chu alung hang behseh jengin, ache mangin hitin aseitai, “Vetan, kei ngaitoa chu ama tah kahenga hung potdoh mong mongin tin, hung dinga Pakai min apat’a a-Pathen henga tao ding, katiphah chung dunga hi akhut apeilea, aphah lai jouse hi aboldam dinga kagel ahi.

Hiti bep ding ahileh Israel gama twi jouse sanga Aba’na le Pharpar vadung teni, Damascus gama long khu atwi jong theng jo hilou ham? Chuti mai maiya theng ding kahileh hiche vadung hoa khu kisil ngim mo kahim?” atin ahi. Hijeh chun akiheiyin lung himo tah-in achetai.

Ahivangin asepaite chun ahenga ahung jol’uvin, “Kapa, themgaopan thil nasa tah khat bol dinga nasola ahileh iti nabolda thei ding ham? Aman nangma jah a, ‘Gakisil lhan chutileh nathen ding ahi,’ tia asei kalvala chu ipipen bah asei nah lai ding ham?” atiuve.

Hijeh chun Na’aman jong achesuh paiyin ama le ama Jordan vadunga twi lah a sagi vei akiphum in Pathen mipa sei bang bangin agabol tai; hichun atahsa chu akithah semsoh keiyin, naosen vouso abang jengin, ama jong athengsoh tai.

Na’aman jong Pathen mipa henga chun ahung ki nungle kit’in, ama ahin aloi agolte jouse jong ahung kilhon ‘uvin ahi; hiti ahungin Elisha angsunga adingin aseitai, “Vetan, leiset chung pumpia hin Pathen mun danga aumpon, Israelte lah a bou Pathen aume, ti keiman kahedoh tai; hijeh chun tun nasohpa keiman thilpeh ding them khat kahinpoh hi neisan peh tei teiyin,” atin ahi.
Ahivangin Elisha’n adonbut’in, “Keiman kahou hing jing Pakai min a kasei ahi, keiman thilpeh imacha kilah ponge,” atitai. Na’aman’in apeh nah nah vangin Elisha anompon ahi.

Adahel phat chun Na’aman hin aseiyin. “Achutilouva ahileh lungset tah-in nasohpa keima hin sakolpol nijen poh khop leiset gih jat a gih bep khat neipeh sah tan, ajeh chu tukal a lhah keiman Pakai tailou houdang bih dang doi henga pumgo thilto hi hen lang kilhaina gantha ding hijongleh kabol louhel ding ahitai.

Kachonna chung changa hin nasohpa hi Pakaiyin eingaidam hen; kapu lengpa chu Rimmon houina doi houva achetengleh keima banjanga ki-ngamji ahin, keitah jong hiche Rimmon houin sunga hi bohkhup ji kahi, hitobanga keima jeng jong hiche Rimmon houin sunga khu kaboh khup tengleh Pakaiyin nasohpa hi hiche thudola hin eingai dam tei tei hen,” tin ataove.
Elisha’n ajah a aseipeh-in, “Lung mongin chetan,” ati. Ahin Na’aman chu Elisha koma konin phabep gamlan agache chon bep’in ahileh,

Pathen mi Elisha sohpa Geha’zi chun aseiyin, “Vetan, kapun hiche Syria mi Na’aman kitipa khu imacha lo louhel’in alhan, athilpoh jong khu akhut’a konin akilah tapoi. Hing jing Pakai min a kasei ahi, keiman anung del ing ting Na’aman thil them khat beh kakilah ding ahi,” atin;

hiti hin Geha’zi kitipa hin Na’aman nung ajuitai. Anung lama mi khat’in ahin nung del amudoh phat in ama lamto din Na’aman jong kangtalai chunga konin ahung kumlha tan ahi. Chule anadongin, “Ima apha pha hinam?” anatia ahileh,

Geba’zi jong chun adonbut’in, “Ima jouse apha cheh nai. Kapun nahenga eishinsola hitia asei ahi, ‘Lungset tah-in hin ngaiton, tutah chun Ephraim thing lhang gama konin themgaoho chate gollhang ni ahung lhung lhone, amani ding hin dangka talent khat le golvah von ni neihin pen,’ tin aseiye,” ati.

Hichun Na’ama’n jong chun asei pai jengin, “Talent ni beh kilah jengin.” ati. Hiti hin a no no jengin dangka talent ni jen atedoh peh-in, sakhao nin akhumin, golvah von ponsil ni toh agon than, hicheng hi asohte mini apohsah tan, ama nin jong Geha’zi angsunga apolut lhon tai.

Chuin Geha’zi hi thing lhang vum ahung gei phat’in akhut lhona konin athilpoh chengse lhon chu alan, abonchan insunga akoitai: chujouvin thilpo teni chu asoldoh paiyin ahileh amani jong ache mang lhon tan ahi.
Hichun Geha’zi hi alut’in apupa henga aga dingin ahileh, Elisha’n ajah a aseiyin. “Hoilama gache nahim, Geha’zi?” atia adoh leh, aman jong, “Nasohpa hoimacha kachedoh poi,” tin alep tai.

Ahivangin Elisha’n ajah a aseiyin, “Na’aman kitipa chu akangtalai chunga ahung kiheiya nangma lamto dia ahung pet’a chu keijong nang toh lhagaova ikilhon hi lou ham? Hichepet’a chu sum le ponsil kilah phat hiya, olive thingga boh le lengpilei kilah phat; kelngoi le bongchalte kisan phat, soh pasal le soh numei tam pi kisan phat mong hinam?

Hitobanga nachonjeh hin Na’aman phahna tiphah nat chu nachunga cheng den jeng hen lang, chule atonsot geiyin nangma son le chilhahte chunga cheng den jing jeng hen,” ati. Hijeh chun Geha’zi jong Elisha angsunga konin apotdoh doh chun aphah pai jengin, buhbang banin abang tan ahi.
Themgao chaten Elisha jah a aseiyuvin, “Vetan, nangma lamkaina noiya ichen nau mun hi aneo behseh jenge.
Hijeh chun Jordan vadung lama cheu hitin, thing gakisui cheh-u hitin, hikoma khun chenna ding mun gakisem cheh-u hite,” atiuve. Hijeh chun Elisha’n jong adonbut’in, “Chetauvin,” atitai.
Ahivangin alah uva mi khat chun aseiyin. “Lungset tah-in nasohte keiho hi neilhonpi tei teiyun,” tia atema ahileh, Elisha’n jong adonbut’in, “Nalhonpi nau vinge.” atin:
hiti hin amaho chutoh akilhon tai. Hitia hi Jordan vadung ahung gei phat’uvin thing phung akiphuh tauve.
Hichea mi khat chun thing aphuhna a konin aheichang akhen lhongin twi lah a alhalut jel tai; hichun a mapa jong apengjah jengin, “Vo hepu, hiche heicha khu bat dia kahin lah ahihouve,” ati.

Chuphat’in Pathen mipan jong, “Hoikoma chu-em?” tin adonge. Heicha lhah lutsah pan alhah lutna lai chu aseipeh phat’in Elisha’n jong mol-kang khat asat lhan, alhah lutna a chu akho lhan heichang chu akiletdoh sah jenge.
Hichun Elisha’n aneipa jah a chun, “Kilah loiyin,” ati. Hijeh chun aman jong akhut alhangin akilah tan ahi.
Syria lengpa’n Israelte dou nan gal ahinbol kit’in, asepaite chutoh lungthim akhengtouvin hitin aseiye, “Hitobang bang mun lai ho hi keiman ngahmun semna kanei ding ahi,” ati.
Ahin hichea hin Pathen mipa hin Israel lengpa ahil masan, “Hikom langa khu Syria mite hung kitolsuh diu ahin, hijeh chun hiche lampi khu nahopa louna din kichih theiyin,” ati.

Hichun Israel lengpa’n jong Elisha seina muna ding chun sepaite asol pai kit’in ahi. Ajeh chu hitia hi Elisha’n lengpa chu ahil masah dem jia ahileh lengpa jong kigingsa um theiji ahi: hitobanga hi khatvei val nivei valjena anabolsa ahitan, huhjong ahuh-doh jingsa anahi.

Hitobang thil abolpeh jeh hin Syria lengpa chu alung gim lheh jengin, hijeh chun asepaite akouvin ajah-uva aseitai, “Eiho lah a koipen tah hi Israel lengpa panpi ihiuvam, neiseidoh peh lou diu ham?” tin adonge.

Hichun asepaite lah a mi khat chun aseiyin, “Koimacha a pang poi, vo kapu lengpa; amavang nangman najalkhun indan sunga nasei thu jouse hi Israelte lah a cheng themgaopa Elisha chun Israel lengpa jah a aseithu thu ahihouve,” ati.

Chuphat’in Syria lengpa’n jong aseiyin, “Cheuvin lang gave-lhi le tauvin, ama chu hoiya umji ham gamel chih-un, keiman mi sol ingting kamatsah ding ahi,” atin ahi. Chuin Syria lengpa jah a chun min aseipeh tan, “Vetan, Elisha chu Dothan khoa achenge,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun Syria lengpa’n jong sakolte leh kangtalai tampi toh sepai tamtah asol thai; amaho chu ahunguvin jan laiyin ahung kitol lut’uvin akhopi chu aumtauve.

Jingkah chun Pathen mipa Elisha sohpa chu jingpi tah-in athouvin agapotdoh a ahileh, vetan, khopi kimvela chun sepaite leh sakolte chule kangtalai tampi anakigol kimsoh jenguvin ahi. Chutah chun Elisha sohpa jong apengjah jengin, “Vo kaden hepu, ipi i-iti ding hitam?” atin ahileh;
Elisha’n jong aseiyin, “Kicha hih-in, ijeh-inem itileh amaho panpi ho sangin eini panpi ho atamjon ahatjoi,” ati.

Chuin Elisha chu ataovin aseitai, “O Pakai, nahenga katao ahi, hichepa hin amudoh theina din amit teni vahsah tan,” atia ahileh; Pakaiyin gollhangpa mit teni chu avahsah paiyin, hijeh chun aman jong amudoh tai; hichea hin vetan, Elisha kimvela molsang pumpi chu sakolte le kangtalai jeng anadimset jengin, meikong adeuje ju jengin ahi.

Hichun Syria miten ahindel suh phat’uvin Elisha jong Pakai henga ataovin aseitai, “Hiche mite hi dengin lang amit-u chotsah soh keiyin, nahenga katao ahi,” atileh; Pakaiyin jong Elisha taona dunguiyin amaho chu amit-u achotsah soh keiyin ahi.

Hichun Elisha’n amaho jah a aseipeh-in, “Hiche hi lampi ahipoi, khopi nahol-u jong hiche hi ahipoi, kanung hin juiyun, keiman namiholpau henga chun nalhut nau vinge,” atin; hiti hin amaho chu abonchan Samaria khopia apui lut peh tai.

Amaho chu Samaria khopi sung ahung lut jou jouvin Elisha jong ataovin, “Vo Pakai, hiche mite hinkho amu theina diuvin amit-u hasah tan,” atileh; Pakaiyin amaho chu amit-u ahasah paiyin, amahon jong kho amutauve; hichun vetan, amaho chu Samaria khopi lailunga anading tauvin ahi.
Israel lengpa’n amaho hi amudoh phat’in Elisha jah a aseiyin, “Hepa, amaho hi katha ding hitam? Katha ding hitam?” tia adoh a ahileh;

Elisha’n adonbut’in, “Amaho hi natha louding ahi. Nangman chemjam hemhat le thalpi kap thema soh changa nakaiji ho chu natha ji nah am? Amaho hi an nehsah jon lang twi donsah jon, chuleng amahon an neuvin tin twi adon diu apupau lengpa henga nung che kit ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hijeh chun Israel lengpa’n jong golvah nasa tah abolpin, amahon jong aneh uva adon chim phat’uvin asol mangin, amaho chu apu u henga achetauve. Hiche kal hin Israel gamsunga michom din Syria mite ahung kit tapouve.
Khonungin Syria lengpa Ben-hadad chun asepaite abonchan asimdoh soh keiyin, akontouvin Samaria khopi aga umin ahi.

Akhopi a um laiyu hin Samaria khopi sunga kel ahung hah tan, sangan luchang khat dangka shekel som get hel amat chan geiyin akhopi aum um jenguvin ahi, gamlouthul til jeng jong kab khat hop lia hop khat’a chun dangka shekel nga manin akijoh jengin ahi.
Hichun Israel lengpa chu palvuma ahung vah len ahileh, numei khat hi ahenga ahung kap jengin hi tin aseiye, “Vo lengpa kapu, neipan pin,” ati.
Lengpan jong aseiyin, “Pakaiyin nakithopia napanpi louleh keiman hoiya kalah a kapanpi jou ding nahim? Changphola chang kalah ding ha, lengpitwi hehna a kona kagadop peh ding nahim?” ati.

Chujongle lengpa’n amanu chu adongin, “Ipi ham nagenthei na chu?” atia ahileh; amanun adonbut’in, “Hiche numei nu hin kajah a, ‘Nachapa chu hinlan tunin ama chu kithatin nehite, jing tengleh keima chapa kitha kit hitin nena hite, atin;
Hijeh chun kachapa chu kakihon min lhonin kane lhontai. Ajing nikhon ken jong amanu jah a kaseiyin, ‘Nachapa chu hinpuidoh tan kitha hitin neta hite, katia ahileh; aman achapa akisel mangtai,” ati.
Numei nu thusei hi lengpa’n ajah doh phat’in aponsil jouse abottel jengin, palvuma achepet ahijeh chun mipin aveuvin ahileh amusoh keiyun, lengpa’n khaodip pon akisil’in,
hichea chun aseitai, “Tunia Shaphat chapa Elisha luchang katan louva ahileh Pathenin keima chuti chun eibol jeng hen lang akhoh cheh jon jong eibol hen,” atin aseitai.

Elisha chu ainsunga atouvin, kho upate jong akoma atouvun ahi. Hichepet hin lengpan akoma konin mi khat Elisha henga ahinsol’in ahi; ahin hiche sottolle pa hi ahung lhun masangin Elisha’n upaho jah a ama thudol anasei masan, “Hiche tolthat lengpa’n keima lu tan dinga mi ahinsol khu nahet nah uvam? Veuvin lang sottolle pa khu ahung teng leh kot khah jengun, lutsah dauvin; anunga akengto gin kija khu apupa lengpa hilou ham?” ati.

Hitia hi Elisha chun upaho jah a thu anasei chai masang hin lengpa chu Elisha henga ahung suh pai jengin, ahung seitai, “Hiche gentheina hi Pakaiya kon ahi! Ipi dinga keima Pakaiya kakinep nep nah lai ding ham ong?” atin ahi.

Ahivangin Elisha’n jong aseipeh-in, “Pakai thusei ngaiyin: Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, jing teng tuphat don tah hi leh an tuitah chu ate-na khat dim shekel khat a kijoh ding, sakol chang ate-na dim ni jong shekel khat dinga hiche Samaria khopi kelkot phunga hung kijoh ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun sepai lamkaipa, lengpa jong akhut’a kingai jingpa chun Pathen mipajah a aseiyin, “Pakai amatah jengin jong van a kona bangkot tampi ahondoh a, hitobang thil hi abol ding hijongleh hithei mong ding hinam?” atin ahi. Ahivangin Elisha’n jong aseipeh kit’in, “Athilsoh ding hi namit tenia vang namu tei tei ding ahin, neh vang naneh lou ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Hichelai hin miphah li jen hi Samaria kelkot phunga anaumin ahi; amaho chu khat le khat akihouvun aseitauve, “Ibola thi ngah bep’a hikoma imoh tou tou jeng diu ham?

Ijem tin ‘Khopi sunga lut tau hite,’ tin sei jong leu hen khosunga kel ahahsa behseh jengin, khosunga ithi thou thou diu ahin; hikoma touden den kit jong leu hen athi ding ma ma ihiuve. Chuti ahijeh chun tun hunguvin, galkai jengu hitin Syria mite ngahmun sunga vah lut jengu hite; amahon eihing hoiyuva ahileh ihin diu hijengin tin, eithauva ahijongleh ithi diu himaiyinte,” akitiuvin ahi.
Hijeh chun jingpi phalvah-in akipatdoh-uvin, Syria mite ngahmuna valut din agouve; ahinla Syria mite ngahmun pamchin dung ahung geiyuva ahileh, vetan, mihem koimacha anaum tapoi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Syria mite jah dinga kangtalai tamtah gin le sakolte kengto gin aginsah a, sepaite hon jamah kitolgin ajah sah phat’a, Syria mite kihouvuva, “Vetan, eiho sat dinga Israel lengpa’n Hit mite leng ho leh Egypt mite leng ho agathalah ahitai,” atiu ahi.

Hijeh a chu amaho abonchauva jingpi phalvah dontah a jamdoh soh keiyuva aponbuh jouseu leh asakol jouseu, asangan jouseu adalhah soh keiyuva, ngahmun jeng jong chu abang banga adalhah uva, akihinso so na diuva jamsoh hel ahitauve.

Chuin hiche miphah ho hi ngahmun pamchin ahung lhun phat’uvin ponbuh sung khat’a hin alut’uvin, an aneuvin twi adontauve, chujongle dangka le sana jong, ponsil jeng jong akichom’uvin akisel manguvin ahi; chuin ahung kit’uva ponbuh chom khat’a agalut kit’uva ahileh thil aum kit’in hicheho chu apouvin akisel mang kit tauve.

Miphah ho chu khat le khat akihouvun, “lthilbolu hi adih tapoi. Tuni nikho hi kipa nikho khat ahihouve; hiti hin eiho moh umthim beh jengu hen lang jingkah khovah lhah ngah jeng leu hen talent imatlo diu ahi; hijeh chun tun hunguvin eiho cheu hitin lengpa inkote gaseipeh tau hite,” akitiuvin ahi.

Hijeh chun miphah ho chu ahunguvin kelkot ngah miho chu akouvun ajah uva aseitauve, “Keiho Syria mite ngahmuna kona hung kahiuvin, vetan, mihem khat jeng cha jong akilulah pon, husa jeng jong akijapoi, imacha dang um louvin sakolte akihen chet chut jengin, sangante jong akihen’uvin, ponbuh jouse jong abang bangin akisong chel chul jenguve,” atiuvin ahi.
Hiti hin kelkot ngah ho chu akikou doh uvin athuseiyu chu lengpa insunga agaseipeh tauvin ahi.

Janlai chun lengpa athoudoh paiyin asohte jah a aseiyin, “Syria miten eiho hi ilo dia eigot-u ahi, keiman naseipeh uvinge. Eiho hi kel thoh a um ihiu ahet-u ahitan, hijeh a chu ngahmun hi adalhah uva potdoh soh keiyuva gamlah a gakisel ahitauve; hitia hi eiho hi khopi sunga kona ahung kitoldoh tengu leh ahingin kimat-u hitin chujouteng leh khopi sunga lut nau hite,’ tia agel’uva abolu ahihouve,” ati.
Hichea hin lengpa sohte mi khat’ in aseiye, “Israel mipi athi lhamsa bang banga thina ding hikoma ahing nalai sakol nga hi kaiyu hitin mi phabep sol-u hitin ipi iti mong ham, vetem’u hite,” ati.
Hijeh chun amahon mi ni sakol kangtalai chunga atousah uvin lengpa’n amani chu Syria mite nungsang kholtoh din asol tai, chule amani jah a hitin aseiye, “Che lhonin lang gakhol chen lhon tan,” ati.

Hijeh chun amani jong Jordan vadung geiyin achepeh lhone; ahin vetemin, lampi dung lhung keiyin ponsil le gal manchah athang lhungpeh jengin, Syria miten alung kin pet’uva alhai nauva asemang jengu adimset’e. Chuphat’in sottolle teni chu ahung kile kit lhonin lengpa jah a aseipeh lhon tai.

Chutah chun mipi akitoldoh uvin Syria mite ngahmun agachom tauve. Hijeh chun an tuitah jong chu ate-na khat dimset shekel khat manin akijoh-in, sakol chang jong ate-na ni dimset chu shekel khat manin bou akijoh tai, Pakai thusei bang bangin asoh jenge.

Lengpan jong abanjanga aki-ngaina jing sepai lamkaipa kulpi kelkot phung ngah din apansah tai; hichea hin masanga Pathen mipa henga lengpa ahung kumsuh pet’a anaseipeh bang bangin mipin kot akichu nauva konin sepai lamkaipa chu tolto achot phauvin athiden tai.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen mipa hin lengpa jah a anaseiya, “Sakol chang ate-na ni jeng jong shekel khat man a kijoh a, an tuitah jong jing nikho tuphat don tah hileh Samaria kelkot phunga shekel khat man a bou hung kijoh ding ahi,” tia anaseipet chun,

hiche sepai lamkaipa hin Pathen mipa chu anadonbut’in, “Pakai amatah jengin jong van a kona bangkot tampi ahondoh a, hitobang thil hi abol ding hijongleh hithei mong ding hinam?” tia anasei ahi. Hichea hi Pathen mipan jong anaseipeh a, “Athilsoh hi nangman namit tenia vang namu ding ahin, naneh khah lou ding ahi” anatipeh ahi.
Hijeh a chu achunga hitia hi soh jeng ahin, mipin kelkot phunga chu achotphauva ama jong thiden ahitai.

Elisha’n achapa achohing peh kit numeinu jah a chun aseiyin hitin ati, “Kipatdoh-in lang, na-inkote kipuiyin lang naphah jou chan khol gajin tan, ajeh chu Pakaiyin kel alhah sah kit ding ahin, gamsunga hi kum sagi sunga kel hunglang ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun numei nu jong chu akipatdoh paiyin, Pathen mipa thusei bang bangin aboltai; amanun ainkote chengse akipuiyin kum sagi sung hin Philistine gamsunga agakhopem’n ahi.
Kum sagi kichai phat’in, numei nu jong Philistine gama kona ahung kile kit phat chun amanu jong lengpa henga ainlui le agam kithum din achetai.
Hichepet tah hin Pathen mipa sohpa Geha’zi hileh lengpa anakihou lhonin lengpa’n hitin aseiye, “Elisha’n itobang thil nasa tah tah abol mong mong am, abonchan neiseipeh temin,” tia adoh ahi.

Geha’zi hin lengpa jah a Elisha’n mithisa athodoh kit thusim anaseipeh pet tah chun vetan, achapa thisa athodoh peh numei nu chu lengpa henga ainlui agam kilethum kit dingin ahung vah lut paiyin ahi. Hichun Geha’zi jong hin aseiyin, “Vo lengpa kapu, kasei numei nu chu hiche hi ahin, Elisha’n athisa athodoh kit achapa jong chu hiche hi ahiye,” ati.

Lengpan jong numei nu chu adong paiyin ahileh, amanun jong aseipeh tai. Hijeh chun lengpa’n jong amanu thil thum gelpeh din vaibol khat alhengdoh-in hitin aseipeh-e, “Amanu hi anei lui jouse abonchan lepeh soh keiyin lang chule amanun anadalhah nikhoa pat tuni geiya alousoh jong chu abonchan lepeh soh keiyin,” ati.
Hichelai hin Elisha chu Damascus khopia ahungin ahileh, Syria lengpa Ben-hadad kitipa chu anadam mon ahi; chuin mihon lengpa jah a chun, “Pathen mipa chu hikoma ahunge,” tin aseipeh tan ahi.

Hijeh chun lengpa’n jong Hazael jah a hin aseiyin, “Thil peh ding kichoiyin lang Pathen mipa chu lamto din chen, ama a kon hin Pakai henga phun gasanin, hitin gaseiyin, ‘Hiche natna kona hi keima kadamdoh ding hinam?’ tin adonge, gatin,” ati.

Chuti chun Hazael jong Pathen mipa lamto din achen, thilpeh ding jong achoiye, hiche achoi ho chu Damascus khopia kidong khom thil tampi ahin, sangongsao som li jen poh khopset ahi. Hazael hi Pathen mipa heng ahung lhun phat’in amasanga adingin ajah a aseitai, “Nachapa Ben-hadad, Syria lengpan nahenga eihinsola hitia hi asei ahi, ‘Hiche kanatna kona hi kadamdoh ding hinam?’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin Elisha hin Hazael jah a aseiyin, “Chen lang ajah a gaseipeh tan, ‘Damdoh tei tei nan nate,’ gatin; ahivangin ama chu thi tei tei ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin eivetsah kit ‘in ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Hazael hin mitlha louhel’in ave ve jengin amai ngui hel kahsen aven ahileh, Pathen mipa jong chu amoh ka-lo tan ahi.

Chuphat’in Hazael hin aseiyin, “Ipi dinga naka ham hepu?” atia ahileh; amanjong adonbut’in, “Israel chate chunga nangman thilse nabol ding kamu masahjeh ahi; nangman akulpi jouseu meiya navalvam peh ding, agollhang jouse la chemjama nasat lih soh a, nunao chapangsen jong nachilgoi soh ding, anumei gai pet jouseu jong agai nakhepeh ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun Hazael jong chun aseipai jengin, “Nasohpa keima imacha bon kihi louva uicha tobang bep kahi hilou ham, hitobang thil nasa tah kabol ding chu?” tin adongin ahileh; Elisha’n jong adonbut’in, “Nang hi Syria gama leng chang ding nahi, tin Pakaiyin keima eimusah tai,” atipeh-e.

Chuphat’in Hazael chu Elisha henga konin ahung potdoh pai paiyin apupa lengpa henga ahungle ajah a nadongin, “Elisha’n najah a ipipen asei yam?” anati. Hazael’in adonbut’in, “Nangma hi nanatna a konin damdoh tei tei nan nate, tin kajah a asei nai” ati.
Ahivangin ajing nikhon Ben-hadad hin ponkhou khat alan twiya adekot’in chule amai khu nan aneiyin athi kahsen akijam den tai; chuin athitan ahileh ama khel’in Hazael hi leng ahung changtai.
Israel lengpa Ahab chapa Joram leng chan kal kum nga lhin kumin Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chapa Jeho’ram kitipa hin lengvai ahinpo pan tai.
Jeho’ram ahung leng chan chun ama kum, kum somthum le kum ni alhingin, Jerusalem khopia chun kum get sungin lengvaipon anapange.
Ama hi Ahab chanu toh akichen jeh-in, Israel lengpa Ahab insung mite chonna bang bangin achonin, aumchan alam lhah jouseu ajui soh keiye; hiti hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabolin ahi.

Ahivangin Pakaiyin Judah gam chu asuh mang deh lou ding ahi, ajeh chu aman alhachapa David akhohsah jeh a ahenga kitepna aneiya, David dinga atonsot geiya dinga thaomei vah a vah ding khat apeh dia ama le achapate dia aseisa ahi.
Ama lengvaipoh lai hin Edom gam miten Judah gam lengvai pohna ahin doutauvin, amaho chamtah-in leng khat akitundoh jenguve.

Chuphat’in Joram jong chu akangtalai jouse chutoh akitol than Za’ir agalkaiyin, chuin jankhang laiyin akipatdoh-in, ama jong asakol kangtalai sepaite lamkaiho chutoh Edom mite chu asat chap jeng junguvin, ama hin umkhum jouse chu asat chap tauve; ahivangin asepaite chu ainlam cheh a ajam mangsoh tauve.
Hitia hi Edom miten Judah lengvai pohna chu apai lhahuva tuni geiya hi chamlhat ahiuve. Hichepet hin Libnah jong chun gal ahinbol tai.
Joram natoh thilbol adang dang, atohdoh chengse ahin, aboncha chu Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Hiti hin Joram jong chu apu a pate toh akijam khomin, David khopia chun apu a pate toh avuitha tauve; chuin achapa Ahazi’ah kitipa hin ama khel’in lengvai ahinpotai.
Israel lengpa Ahab chapa Joram leng chan kal kum som le kum nilhin kumin Judah lengpa Jeho’ram chapa Ahazi’ah kitipa hin lengvai ahinpo pan tan ahi.
Lengvai ahinpoh pat hin Ahazi’ah hi akum kum som ni le kum ni alhing bep’e; chujouvin Jerusalem a kum khat sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Athali’ah akitin, Israel lengpa Omri tunu anahi.
Ahazi’ah jong hin Ahab insung mite chonna jouse ajuiyin, Ahab insung mite thilbol achon nau bangin, Pakai mitmun thilse anabole; ijeh-inem itileh ama jong hi Ahab insung mite dinga atupau ahitai.
Ahazi’ah hi Syria lengpa Hazael to kisat dingin Ahab chapa Joram chutoh Ramoth-gilead lama gal akon khom lhonin ahileh, hikoma hin Syria sepaiten Joram chu amavo tauvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Ramah khoa Syria mite toh akisat’a, Syria lengpa Hazael agakisatpi pet’a Syria miten asuh khah nau maha kiboldam dingin Joram lengpa chu Jezreel phaiya ahung kile kit tai. Hitia adammo phat hin Judah lengpa Jeho’ram chapa Ahazi’ah jong chu Jezreel’a Ahab chapa Joram ve din achesuh-in ahi.
Elisha themgaopan themgaoho chapate lah a mi khat akouvin ajah a aseitai, “Nakong kigah-in lang, hiche thaotwi hai hi kichoiyin, chulengle Ramoth-gilead langa chen.
Ramoth-gilead nalhun tengleh Nimshi chapa, Jehoshaphat chapa, Jehu kitipa chu gaholdoh tan; namudoh teng amapa chu dindoh sah-in lang aloi agollah a konin indan sunga puilut paiyin.

Chujou tengle nakhut’a nachoi thaotwihai chu lan lang aluchanga sung lhan, chule hitin seiyin, ‘Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; keiman nang hi Israel chunga leng chang dinga thao kanu nahi,’ tin aseiye tipeh-in. Chujou tengleh kotpi hongdoh pai jengin lang jam mang pai tan, kinomsot hih hel in,” ati.
Themgao gollhangpa chu Ramoth-gilead khoa achetai.

Amapa chu ahung lhun phat’in vetan, sepai lamkai chengse chu anakikhom’uvin akihouvui; ahivangin aman jong asei jengin, “Vo sepai lamkaipu keiman nang din thu kahinpoi,” ati. Hichun Jehun jong, “Keiho lah a koipen ding hi ham?” tia adoh a ahileh; aman jong aseipeh pai jengin, “Vo lamkaipu, nang ding chu ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun Jehu jong akipatdoh paiyin insunga chun agalut tai; hichun themgao gollhangpa hin aluchanga thaotwi asun khum paiyin, ajah a hi tin aseitai, “Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye, ‘Keiman nang hi Pakai mite, Israelte chunga leng chang dinga thao kanu nahi.
Nangman napupa Ahab insung mite nasat gamhel ding, hitia hi ken jong kalhacha themgaote phu kalah peh ding, hitia hi Pakai lhachate jouse thisan phu kalah soh keiya Jezebel chunga phu kalah ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Ahab insung mite hi abonchauva hung mangthah diu ahi; ken jong Ahab insung mite hi Israel lah a pasal tapou, cham lhat hihen lang soh hijongleh kathasoh hel ding ahi.
Chujongle Ahab insung hi keiman Ahijah chapa Ba’asha insung kabolna bang leh Nebat chapa Jerobo’am insung kabolna bang banga kabol ding ahi.

Chutengleh Jezreel gamgi sunga uichaten Jezebel long aneh diu mihem koiman amanu thilong hi avui louhel ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati. Hichun themgao gollhangpa chun kotpi ahongdoh paiyin ajam mang tai.

Apupa sepaite henga ahung potdoh phat chun mihon Jehu jah a anaseiyun, “Apha pha-ah hinai mo? Ipi ding pen tah a hiche mi-ngolpa chu nahenga hunga hai?” anatiuve. Hichun Jehun jong ajah uva aseiyin, “Hichepa chu nang hon jong nahet cheh uva chule athusei jong nahet-u chume,” ati.

Ahivangin amahon “Kahepouve, tun neiseipeh jouvin,” atiuvin ahi. Chuphat’in Jehun jong aseitai, “Amapa chun hitobang bang hin kajah a aseiyin, hitin ati, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Keiman nang hi Israel chunga leng chang dia thao kanusa nahitai, ” ati,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin amahon amitakip chun aponsil akimat soh keiyuvin, Jehu noiya kalbi lei noiya chun aphauvin, chuin saki pengkul amut’uvin, “Jehu hi leng achang tai,” tin aphongdoh tauve.
Jehu kitipa, Nimshi chapa, Jehoshaphat chapa chun Joram dounan gal ahinbol tai. Hichepet’a hi Joram le Israel pumpi chu Syria lengpa Hazael douna Ramoth-gilead khoa anachang pang ahiuve;

hichepet’a hi Joram lengpa hi masanga Syria lengpa Hazael toh akisat na a Syria miten amavo nau kibol damsah dinga Jezreel khoa ache-na kona hung kiledoh kit bep ahiye. Hiti hin Jehu hin aseiyin, “Hiche hi nangho lunglam ahiya ahileh, khopi sunga kon hin mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong potdoh sah hih hel’uvin Jezreel khoa Joram henga hiche thu hi gaseisah dauvin,” ati.

Hichun Jehu jong asakol kangtalai chunga atoudoh paiyin Jezreel kho langa achetai, ajeh chu hikoma hi Joram chu damlou laiya lum nalai ahi. Hichea hi Judah lengpa Ahazi’ah jong chu Joram vedia hung suh ahi.

Hichepet hin Jezreel khopi kulpi insunga chu kho-ngah mi khat ding jing ahin, amahin achepum pumin Jehu loite chu aguh-in asimtoh soh keiyin. “Keiman sepai hon khat kamui,” ati. Hichun Joramin aseiyin, “Sakol touthem mi khat sol in lang amaho chu galamto sah-in, ‘Chamna thua hung nahiu hinam?’ tin gadoh sah tan,” ati..

Hijeh chun mi khat chu sakol chunga atouvin Jehu lamto din achen, chule ajah a hitin agaseiye, “Lengpan hitin aseiye, ‘Chamna thua hung nahi hinam?’ tin aseiye,” agati. Ahinla Jehu chun aseiyin, “Chamna chu ipi bolnan neiying nati ham? Hung kiheiyin lang keima nunga hin nasakol chunga chun hung tou jeng tangem,” ati. Hichun kho-ngah pan aseidoh pai kit jengin, hitin ati, “Sottol kisolpa chu akomu alhung tan, ahinla ahung kinungle kit tapoi,” ati.

Chuphat’in aman jong anivei nan sakol touthem mi khatma asol kittai; amajong hi ahenguva ahungin, ahung seiye, “Lengpan hitin aseiye, ‘Nahungu hi chamna thu hinam?’ tin a seiye,” ati. Jehun adonbut kit’in, “Chamna chu ipi bol nan neiying nati ham? Hung kiheiyin lang keima nunga hin nasakol chunga chun hung tou jeng tangem,” kit leuve.

Hichun jong kho-ngah pan aphongdoh kit’in, “Sottol kisolpa chu akomu ageitan, ahinla ahung kinung le kit tapoi. Chule asakol tildol khu Nimshi chapa Jehu sakol tiltoh abange; ijehinem itileh hamve vun ahintil jenge,” ati.

Hichun Joram injong aseitai, “Kigo tan,” atia ahileh; akangtalai chu agotpeh tauvin ahi. Chujouvin Israel lengpa Joram le Judah lengpa Ahazi’ah jong chu akitoldoh pai lhon tan ahi, anigel lhonin ama ama kangtalai chung cheh a atou lhonin Jehu lamto din ache lhontai; chuin ahung lhonin Naboth Jezreel khoa anachengpa lengpilei laiya chun akimupi lhonin ahi.

Joram hin Jehu amudoh phat’in aseitai, “Jehu, chamna thua hung nahi hinam?” atia ahileh; Jehun jong adonbut paiyin, “Nanu Jezebel jeh a chon thanghoi, noti umchan hijat le doithua phunsan hijat lah a hi ipi chamna umthei ding ham ong?” ati.
Hichun Joram jong akihei paiyin Ahazi’ah jah a chun, “Vo Ahazi’ah hichepa hi lengmun lahpeh dia kigo ahihouve,” tin aseipeh-in ajam mang tai.

Ahivangin Jehun jong athahat nei chasunin athalpi chu kikhong kheh-in aloiyin agah kap’a ahileh, Joram chu alengkou teni kah lai tah a aleng lut jel jengin, thalchang chun alung chang laitah athilpai jenge; hijeh chun Joram jong akangtalai chunga chun akitalden jengin ahi.

Chuphat’in Jehun jong agal lamkaipa Bidkar jah a chun, “Joram long khu gapodoh-in lang Jezreel mi Naboth kitipa lengpilei laiya gasep lut tan; ijeh-inem itileh hichea hi nangman masang laiya eini hi Joram pa Ahab jet le veiya sakol chunga itoupet lhona Pakaiyin ama douna hiche thophon anaseisa chu nageldoh ding ahi.

’Keiman jan hi le lea Naboth le achapate thisan kiso kamu bang banga keiman hiche lengpilei muna hi nang chunga phu kalah tei tei ding ahi,’ tia Pakaiyin anaseisa ahi. Hijeh chun tun Joram long khu gapudoh pai paiyin lang Pakai thusei dungjuiyin hikom lengpilei muna hin seplut tan,” ati.

Judah lengpa Ahazi’ah jong chun Jehu thilbol hi amudoh phat’in ama jong Beth-haggan lama a jam tan ahi. Ahivangin Jehun ama jong chu anung adelpeh kit’in, “Ama jong khu kap tau,” atia ahileh; asepaiten jong Ahazi’ah chu Ibleam koma um Gur lang kaldohna laitah a chun akap lhu uvin, kangtalai sunga akitalden kit tai; ahivangin Megiddo langa ajampai peh nalaiyin, hikoma chun agathi den tai.
Ahin asohten ama long jong chu apouvin kangtalai khat hin Jerusalem khopia ahintol lut’uvin, David khopia ama lhankhuh a chun apu apate toh avuitha tauve.
Ahab chapa Joram leng chan kal kum som le kum khat lhin kumin Ahazi’ah hi Judah gamsunga hung leng changa lengvaipoa hung pang pan anahi.
Jehu chu Jezreel khoa ahung lut’in ahileh, ahung thudol chu Jezebel hin anajatai. Chuin Jezebel chun amit teni akijem hoisel’in, asam akipojol’in bangkot’a konin agah ven ahi.
Ahin kelkot phunga Jehu ahung lut jou jouvin Jezebel chun anasei paiyin, “Chamna thudol hinai mo, apupa that a pang Zimri tol that pa?” tin anadongin ahi.
Hichun Jehun jong bangkot lam chu agahven aseitai, “Koi koi ham keilama pang? Koi naum um?” atileh; nukisosa mini ham thum ham khat hin ahin veuvin ahi.

Hijeh chun Jehun jong aseiyin, “Hiche nu chu hinson lhauvin,” atia ahileh, amahon jong ason lha tauve; Jezebel thisan phabep chu bang dunga jong ahung nat pan, sakolte chung dung jenga jong ahung nat pai; chuin mihon amanu chu akengton achilgoi goi jenguvin ahi.

Chujouvin Jehu jong insunga alut’in an anen twi adontai; chujongle Jehu hin aseiyin, “Hiche gaosap chang numei nu hi vetau; hijongle amanu khu gavui tauvin, ajeh chu ama jong hi leng chanu pi hiya chu?” ati.
Ahinla miho chu amanu vui dinga acheuva ahileh alubuh homkeo le akeng gu teni, aban gu teni tilou adang imacha agamudoh tapouve.

Ahung nung kit’uva Jehu jah a aseipeh phat’uvin aman jong aseitai, “Pakaiyin alhachapa Tishbe khoa mi Elijah jah a aseisa athusei chu hiche hi ahi, ‘Jezreel khosunga uichaten Jezebel long hi aneh jou diu ahi;

chujongle Jezebel thilong atahsa chu Jezreel gamsunga ehle jun banga uma, mangthah ding, mihem koimachan jong “Hiche hi Jezebel kitinu chu ahi,” tia asei ding aholdoh louhel ding ahi,’ anatisa ahi,” ati.

Samaria khopi sung jeng jenga jong Ahab chapate pasal som sagi jen ana um nalaiyui. Hijeh chun Jehu hin lekha tampi ajih-in hiche ho hi Samaria khopi langa kho upa ho heng leh Ahab chapate chingtup a pang ho henga athot’in hitin aseiye,

“Tua hi hiche lekha thot chengse hi nahenguva ahung lhun tengleh, napu u chapate jong nangho koma chenguva, sakol kangtalai chengse jong nakom’uva um soh kei ahin, kulpi kikaikhum jouse jong nangho thu thua uma, gal manchah jouse jong nangho khut’a uma ahi;
hijeh chun napu u chapate lah a aphapen tah le akilompen tah chu lhengdoh uvin lang apa laltouna tousah uvin, chule napu u insung mite huh nan gal sat uvin,” ati.
Ahivangin amaho chu akicha behseh jeng tauvin aseitauve, “Vetan leng ni bon ama masanga a pan jou louva ahileh, eiho them them iti ipan jou diu ham?” akitiuve.

Hijeh chun leng inpi vaipopa leh khopi sung vaipopa toh chule kho upa chengse leh leng chapate chingtup chengse chu akihoutoh uvin Jehu henga thu athot’un hitin aseiyuve, “Keiho hi nangma soh jeng kahiuve, nangin kabol diuva nasei chan chu kabol jeng diu ahi. Hijeh chun keihon mi koima dang cha jong lengin pansah deh pouvinge, nangma mit vet’a naphatsah sah chu bol jengin,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Jehu hin anivei lhin nan lekha khat athot kit’in hitin aseiye, “Nang ho hi kei dinga pang mong nahiuva, kathu na-ngai diuva ahileh, napu pau chapate luchang jouse hintan uvin lang, jing tengleh tuphat don hin Jezreel khopia keima henga hinpo lut tauvin,” ati. Hichelaiya hi lengpa chapate mihem som sagi jen hi amaho vahdoh a hung pang pasal hat cheh khopi sunga chengte chutoh cheng khom cheh ahiuve.

Jehu lekha thot chu ahenguva ahung phat’in amahon jong leng chapate aman khomsoh keiyun mihem som sagi jen chu athat gam’uvin, aluchang jouseu chu pocha sunga akhol khom’uvin, pocha tampin Jezreel khopi langa chun Jehu henga athot tauve.

Sottolle khat ahungin Jehu jah a chun, “Mihon lengpa chapate luchang jouse chu ahinpo tauve,” tia ahung seipeh phat’in Jehun jong aseitai, “Kulpi kelkot laitah a khun aluchang jouseu chu lhuh nin seuvin jingkah khovah lhah geiyin umsah uvin,” ati.

Ajing jingkah khovah phat’in Jehu jong apotdoh-in kelkot phunga aga dingin mipi jah a chun agaseitai, “Nang ho themmona bei nahiuve. Kapupa douva athat a pang chu keimajoh kahihouve; ahile mihem hijatpi that gam jenga chu koipen ham?
Kihetsoh keiyun, Ahab insung chung chang thudola Pakaiyin thu aseisa chu khat’a khat jeng cha jong tol a lha louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu Pakaiyin alhachapa Elijah kama aseisa chu aboldoh ahitai,” ati.

Hijeh chun Jehun Jezreel khoa um nalai, Ahab insung mite chengse leh asepai hat lai jouse jong, akihetpi akihou theipi jouse jong, athempu ho jong, abonchauvin athat soh keiyin, ahing hoi beihel’in alhatai.
Chujouvin Jehu chu akipatdoh-in Samaria lama achetai; ahin lampia ahungna a hin kelngoi ching ho Beth-eked kiti lai chu ahung gei phat’in,

Jehu hin Judah lengpa Ahazi’ah inkote mi phabep akimupin ajah uva, “Koi nahiuvam?” tia adoh a ahileh; amahon jong adonbut’uvin, “Keiho hi Ahazi’ah lengpa inkote kahiuvin, tua hi lengpa chapate leh lengnu chapate vil a hung suh kahiuve,” tin aseitauve.

Jehun jong, “Amaho hi ahingin man’uvin,” tia aseileh; mihon jong abonchauvin ahingin aman’uvin, Beth-eked kiti laiya kokhuh sunga chun athat gamtauve; amaho chu mihem som li le ni jen ahiuvin, khat’a khat jeng cha jong ahing hoi tapouvin ahi.

Hikoma kona hi Jehu jong achedoh kit’a ahileh Rechab chapa Jehon’adab kitipa chu ama toh kimuto din ahunge; hichun Jehun jong adong pai jengin, “Nang chunga keima kalung athensel banga hi keima lungthim dinga nang lungthim jong thengsel hinam?” tin adong e. Hichea hin Jehon’adab chun adonbut’in, “Athengsel nai,” ati. Jehun jong aseiyin, “Chuti ahileh neihin sangin, atin ahileh; Jehon’adab jong chun agah sang paiyin, hichun Jehun jong ama kangtalai sunga apui lut paitan ahi.
Jehu chun aseiyin, “Neilhonpin lang Pakai dinga katom ngaidol hi vetemin,” atin, hiti chun akangtalai chunga atoupin ahi.

Chujouvin Samaria khopia ahunglut phat’in Samaria khopia chenga Ahab insung mite tapou chu athat that jengin, abonchauva asuh gam hel kahsen abol’ in, Pakaiyin Elijah jah a anaseisa athusei dunguiyin aboltai.
Jehun mipi abonchan akhomsoh keiyin, ajah uva aseitai, “Ahab chun Ba’al doi hi ahou mai mai ahin, Jehu kitipa vang hin nasa tah a kahou ding ahi.

Hijeh chun tu hin Ba’al themgao jouse le Ba’al hou amite hou toh chule athempua pangjouse chu kahenga hinkou lutsoh keiyuvin, mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong lhasam thei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keiman Ba’al henga kilhaina gantha nasa tah a kabol ding ahin, koi koi hijeng jongleh ahung lou tapou chu kihinghoi louhel ding ahi,” tin aseitai. Jehu chunla hiche hi Ba’al doi houte suhgam theina dinga lungthima abol ahihouve.
Jehun jong aseiyin, “Ba’al houna dingin khoppitheng tah kikhopna bol’uvin thensouvin,” ati. Hijeh chun mihon jong ki khopna chu abol’un aphongdoh tauve.

Hiti hin Jehu hin Israel gam pumpia mi asol soh keiyin, Ba’al doi houva pang jouse ahung soh keitauve; hichea hin ahung lha lou mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong aum tapoi. Chujouvin abon chauvin Ba’al kihouna houin sunga alutsoh keiyun, Ba’al houin chu among lang khat’a pat among lang khat geiyin mihem adimset jenge.

Hichun Jehun jong Ba’al houina kimang ji ponsil jouse ngah a pangpa jah a chun, “Ba’al hou dia hung miho ding hin ponsil jouse chu gapodoh tan,” atia ahileh; aman jong miho din ponsil jouse agapodoh soh tai.

Chuin Jehu chu Rechab chapa Jehon’adab chutoh Ba’al houin sunga alut lhonin, Jehu chun Ba’al houho jah a chun aseitai, “Kikhol chilsoh keiyun, nangho lah ahi Pakai lhacha a pang koima um louhel hinam, Ba’al jeng houho chubou nahiu hinam?” tin adonge.

Chujouvin ama chu kilhaina gantha bola kilhai ding leh pumgo thilto toh din asung lhai. Hichea hi Jehun inpo lama sepai som get apansah a hitia aseipeh ahi, “Keiman nangho khut’a kapeh doh miho jamdoh sah pen pen chu ama kithat ding ahin, ahinkho achanlo ding ahi,” tia agihsa ahitai.

Hitia hi kilhaina abolsoh a, pumgo thilto atojou phat’in Jehun kotngah a pang pa leh vaibol ho jah a chun aseipeh paiyin, “Lut uvin lang abonchan gathat soh keiyuvin, mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong najamdoh sah louhel diu ahi,” atitai. Hiti hin sepaiten amaho chu chemjam in asat chap jenguvin, kotngah le vaibola pang ho chun mithi ho chu apaidoh doh uvin, indan sung nunga avah lut’uvin Ba’al houin sunga alut’un,
Ba’al houin sunga doikhom jong chu ahinpu doh jenguvin meiyin atih tauve.
Chule Ba’al houna doikhom jong kichepnan amanguvin, Ba’al houin jong asuseuvin, tuni gei hin eh-buh in amangtauve.
Jehun hitobang tah hin Israelte lah a konin Ba’al anasu mangin ahi.
Ahinah vangin Jehu jong chu Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chonsetna konin akihei mang deh poi, Jerobo’am in Israelte achonset sahna Bethel kho le Dan khoa sana bongnou lima kisem teni chu aumden sah nalaiye.

Chuin Pakaiyin Jehu henga thu ahinseiyin “Hitobanga nangman kei mitmua thildih jeng nabola, keiman kalungthima kadei bang banga Ahab insung mite nabol jeh hin nacha natute jong Israelte laltouna khang li geiya hung touva hung leng changjing ding ahiuve,” ati.

Ahinla Jehu jong chun alungthim pumpia Pakai Israel Pathen danthu dungjuiya chon ding angaiton akitup deh poi; chujongle Jerobo’am in Israel achonset sah na chonset chengsea konin jong akiheidoh deh pon ahi.
Hiche lai hin Pakaiyin Israel mite phabep athat pantai; Israel gamsung pumpia Hazael lengpa’n jong Israelte akisat pin ajou jou jeng tai.

Jordan vadung niso lama pat solam gamkai chengse jong alan, Gilead gamsungse se jong alan, Gad mite gamsung jong alan, Reuben chate gamsung jong alan, Manasseh chate gamsung jong alatan, Amon phaiya Gilead gam le Bashan gam jong Aroer khoa pat a alah ahitai.
Jehu natoh athilbol adang dang, anatoh jouse, athahatna ahin, aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hi lou ham?
Hiti hin Jehu jong chu apu apate toh akijam khomin, mihon Samaria khopia avuitauve. Chuin achapa Jeho’ahaz kitipa chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Samaria khopia Jehun Israelte chunga lengvai apohna phat hi kum som ni le kum get alhinge.
Ahazi’ah lengpa nu Athaliah kitinu hin achapa thi ahetdoh phat’in akipatdoh jengin leng insung mite aban banin athat that jeng tai.

Ahivangin lengpa Joram chanu, Ahazi’ah naonu Jehosh’eba kitinu chun Ahazi’ah chapa Jo’ash kitipa chu lengpa chapate tha ding salhema um ho lah a konin agu mangin adom mang tai, chule Jo’ash le adon’a pangnu chu lupna indan sunga asel mangtan ahi. Hitia hi Jehosah’eba hin Athaliah masanga anasel manga, hijeh a chu amapa tha khah louva anahingdoh nah nah ahi.
Jo’ash hi Jehosh’eba kitinu hitoh kum gup jen anacheng khom lhone. Pakai houin sunga anakisel sel jenge; hiche lai hin Athaliah kitinu hin gamsunga lengvai ana poi.

Kum sagi lhin kumin Jehoi’ada kitipa hin mi asol’in Car mite sepaite lamkaiho le kho-ngah ho agakousah-in, ahenga akou lutsah tai; chuin amaho hi Pakai houin sunga apuilut’in, amaho hitoh kitepna khat asemin, Pakai houin sunga kihahselna abolsah-in, chujouvin lengpa chapa chu amusah tai.
Chule amaho chu thu aseipeh paiyin hi tin aseiye; “Nang hon nabol diu chu hiche hi ahi: Nang ho mi hop thuma hop khat loi, cholngah nikhoa natong louva um chengse nahiuvin,
mi hop thuma hop ni jong chu kho-ngah ho nung lama Sur kelkot phunga pang nahiuvin, hop khat loi chun leng inpi na-ngauva,
nalah uva mi hop thum lah a loi ni loi, cholngah nikhoa thanei tah a panga Pakai houin ngah a pangji ho chun

lengpa hi naum kimsoh keiyuva, nakhut uva gal manchah nakichoi soh kei diu ahi; koi koi hijeng jong leh nangho lah tumkeh dinga hin-go pen pen chu sat lih hel ding ahi. Avaikon availhuna lengpa hi nakilhonpi jingjeng diu ahi,” ati.

Jehoi’ada thempupan athupeh bang bangin sepai lamkaiho chun abol tauve, cholngah nikhoa natong louva um ho jong chun asepai cheh ahinpuiyin, chule cholngah nikhoa natonga pang ho jong chun ama sepaite akipuisoh keiyun Jehoi’ada thempupa henga ahung soh keitauve.
Chuin thempupan jong David lengpa khang laiya kimang, Pakai houin sunga kikoi, tengcha jouse leh ompho jouse chu sepai lamkaiho chu apetai;

chuin sepai in-ngah ho chu ading soh keiyun, sepai jouse chun agal manchah akhut’in akichoi cheh uvin, houin lhang lama pat sah lam geiyin akigol’uvin, maicham kimvel leh houin kimvela jong adinguvin ahi.

Chujouvin Jehoi’ada hin lengpa chapa chu ahinpuidoh pai jengin aluchanga lallukhuh akhuh peh tai; chujongle ama chung changa hin hettohsahna thu aphongin, mipin jong ama chu leng ahi, tin aphongdoh tauve; hiti hin thao anutauvin ahi. Hitah chun mipin akhut abenguvin, “Lengpa hing sot hen:” tin asam tauve.
Athaliah chun sepai in-ngah ho le mipin lhang asap gin chu ajah doh phat’in, achen Pakai houin sunga mipi henga chun agalut tai;

hichea hi agahvet a ahileh, chonna ngaidola lengpa khat hi khompi phung koma anadin amun, sepai lamkaiho leh saki pengkul mut loi chu lengpa koma anadinguve; chujongle gamsung mite chu akipah tha nom’uvin saki pengkul anamut’uve. Chutah chun Athaliah jong chun aponsil abottel jengin apeng jah jeng tai, “Vo lengmun lahpeh dia go-pa, lengmun lah peh dia go-pa!” tin asam tai.

Hichun Jehoi’ada thempupan sepaite chunga lamkaiya kipansah sepai lamkaiho jah a chun thu apen, “Athaliah chu sepai ho lah a hinkai lut jenguvin lang, koi hijongle amanu nung hinjui lut tapou chu that jenguvin,” ati. Ijeh-inem itileh thempupan aseiyin, “Amanu vang hi Pakai houin sunga that den hih uvin,” ati ahi.
Hijeh chun sepai hon jong amanu chunga akhut alhauvin, chuin amanu chu lengpa in lama sakolte kelkot’ a chun achepaiyin, hikoma chun amanu athat tauve.
Jehoi’ada hin Pakai le lengpa toh chule mipi kah a kitepna khat asemin, hitia hi mi jouse chu Pakai mite ahina diuvin aboltai; chujongle mipi le lengpa kah a jong kitepna khatma asemin ahi.

Chujouvin gamsunga mite abonchan akitol’uvin Ba’al houin lang ajon’uvin, aphe-lha soh tauve; Ba’al maicham jouse leh alim doi kisem jouse jong chu avogoi soh hel’uvin, maicham mai lai tah a chun Ba’al them pupa Mattan jong a that tauve. Chuin thempupan Pakai houin ngah din jong sepai akoitai.

Hichea hin sepai lamkaiho leh Car mi sepaite chule in-ngah a pang ho leh gamsung mipi abonchan apuiyin, amaho hin lengpa chu Pakai houin a konin ahinpui suh uvin, lengpa in-ngah ho panmuna kelkot phunga chun ahung kitolsuh uvin ahi. Chuin lengpa chu lengte laltouna atoutai.
Hitobang tah hin gamsung mipi abonchauvin akipah soh keiyuvin ahi; lengpa insunga Athaliah kitinu hi chemjama asat lih jou kal’uvin khopi jong chu cham alengin athip tai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jeho’ash kitipa hi akum kum sagi bou ahi nalaiye.
Jehu leng chan kal kum sagi lhin kumin Jeho’ash kitipa hin lengvai ahinpo pan tai, chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som li jen lengvai anapoi. Anu chu amin Zib’iah akitin. Beer-sheba khoa mi ahi.
Jehoi’ada thempupan phatecha ahilchah jeh-in Jeho’ash hin ahinkho lhum keiyin Pakai mitmua thildih jeng bou anabole.
Ahinla khomol dunga doiphung kisem ho chu asumang deh poi; hiche khomol dunga doiphung dunga hin mipin kithoina abol jom jinguvin, gimnamtui alhut nam jing jeng nalaiyuve.

Thempupa jah a chun Jehn’ash hin aseiyin, “Pakai houin a hung kitoh doh sum jouse ahin, mihemin amichangvala ahinto doh sum jouse ahin, mihem ama ama lungthim sung cheh a thanopna aneiya Pakai houin sunga ahintodoh sum jouse ahin,
aboncha hin thempuhon kilah soh kei yun, mihem ama aman akihetna dungjui cheh a ato ho jong chu kilah than chutengleh houin hi semphat louva akhoh lai jouse semphat nan manguhen,” ati.
Ahinla Jehoash leng chan kal kum som ni le kum thum lhin kum chun thempuhon houin semphat ding lai jouse chu asempha tapouvin ahi.

Hichejeh hin Jeho’ash lengpa’n Jehoi’ada thempupa leh thempu dang ho chu akoukhomin ajah uva aseitai, “Ipi dinga houin nasemphat dau hitam? Hijeh chun tua lhah nakihet piuva konin nanghon sum kilah dauvin lang, sum ahung lut tapou chu houin semphatna din pedoh soh keiyuvin,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun thempuhon jong miho khut’a kona sum akilah louna diuvin akinop touvin, houin semphatna dinga jong a pan louna diuvin anom tauve.

Hichun Jehoi’ada thempupan thih thingkong khat asemin, ahusin a chun ako khat avut vangin, Pakai houina mi ahung kai tengleh ajetlam a maicham koma chun thingkong atung tai. Hichea hin sambuh a mi-ngah a pang ji thempupan Pakai houina dinga mihon sum ahinchoi jouse chu alan thingkong sunga chun alhah lutsah sah jie.

Thingkong sunga chu sum tampi ahitai, ti amudoh phat phat’u leh lengpa lekha sun a pangpa leh thempulen pa chu ahungji lhonin, sum chu asimtoh ji ji lhonin, Pakai houin sunga kidong doh sum chengse chu dip khat’in akhum lhonin akhit chah ji lhon tai.

Chujou tengleh ama nin asum chu atetoh phat phat lhonin Pakai houin semphatna avetoh a pang miho khut’a chun apedoh ji lhonin ahi; chule natoh vetoh a pang ho hin Pakai houin thil thembol miho leh ainsa pangho chu apedoh pai pai jiuvin ahi.

Chutobang ma hin thing vaibola pang ho le song kheng ho jong apeuvin, Pakai houin semphatna dingin thing chohna ding leh song kaldoh a pang ho ding, ipi pi hijongleh Pakai houin semphatna manchah ding pou pouvin sum chu apeuvin ahi.

Ahinla hiche suma kon hin, Pakai houina hung kichoilut akitohdoh sum hin, Pakai houin sunga manchah ding kisilna dangka kong jong akisemna pon, chaiche ho jong akisempon khon ho jong akisem na pon, sumkon jong akisem napoi, sana le dangka a kisem um le bel kong imacha akisem na hih hel’e;
ijeh-inem itileh hiche sum chu Pakai houin semphatna pang natong miho bou kipea kitha lah na ahihouve.
Asum mang ha a pangho hin kitah tah le kitup tah a aman jeh-uvin, amahon jong natong ho peh doh dinga akhut’uva apeh jiu miho henga konin jong asum kisimna lekhabu vettoh tei din agopouve.
Themmo jal a kithoina thilto sum le chonset jeh a kithoina thilto sum chu Pakai houin sunga akipoh lutsah ji pon ahi; sum hi thempuho chan ding ahihouve.
Hiche lai hin Syria lengpa Hazael hi akontouvin Gath khopi agasat jengin, ahinla tan ahi. Hichun Hazael hin Jerusalem khopi jong sat din agon ahinjon pai jeng kit tai;

ahivangin Judan lengpa Jeho’ash hin thensona thilto kikoi chengse Jehoshaphat le Jeho’ram, Ahazi’ah, apu apate Judah lengte thenso thilto jouse leh ama thenso thilto chengse, Pakai houin thil kholna le lengpa insung thil kholna kiholdoh sana jouse chu achom khomin aboncha hin Syria lengpa Hazael henga athot tai. Chuphat’in Hazael jong Jerusalem khopia konin akiheiyin ache mang tai.
Jo’ash natoh athilbol, atohdoh adang dang, abol jouse aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Jo’ash kitipa hi asepaiten ahindouvun, hiti hin asepaiten Jo’ash lengpa chu Silla lang jotsuh na lamlen a Millo insunga athat tauve.

Jo’ash that a pang teni chu asepai teni Shim’eath chapa Jo’zacar le Shomer chapa Jeho’zabad ahilhone, amani hin Jo’ash asat lhuh jeng lhona ama jong thiden ahitai. Chuin mihon Jo’ash jong chu David khopia apu apate toh avui-thauvin, chule ama khel’in achapa Amazi’ah kitipa chun lengvai apotai.

Judah lengpa Ahazi’ah chapa Jo’ash leng chan kal kum som ni le kum thum kumin Jehu chapa Jeho’ahaz kitipa chun Samaria khopia Israelte chunga lengvai ahinpo panin, kum som le kum sagi sungin lengvaipon anapange.

Jeho’ahaz hin Pakai mitmum thilse jeng jeng anabol’in, Nebat chapa Jerobo’am in Israelte achonset sahna, hiche Jerobo’am chonsetna chu ajui kit’in, hitobang chonsetna chengsea konin akihei mang deh poi.
Hijeh chun Israel chunga Pakai alunghang jah jengin, Israelte chu tang louhel’in Syria lengpa Hazael khut le Hazael chapa Ben-hadad khut’a apedoh jing jenge.
Chuphat’in Jeho’ahaz hi Pakai henga ataovin ahileh, Pakaiyin jong ataona asanpeh tan ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Israel gentheina, Syria lengpa’n abol genthei nau chu Pakaiyin amudoh peh ahitai.

Hichejeh hin Pakaiyin Israelte hi ahuhhing diu khat ahinpen, hichea kon hin amaho chu Syria mite khut’a konin akitoldoh tauve; chuin Israelte chu masang lai bang bangin ain cheh a akichen soh tauvin ahi.

Ahivangin Israelte chu Jerobo’am in Israelte achonset sahna, hiche Jerobo’am insung mite chonsetna kon hin akihei mang deh pouvin, Jerobo’am chonsetna jousea chun amaho jong achonsen, Samaria khopia jong chun Ashe’rah doi aumden jing nalaiye.

Chujongle Jeho’ahaz kitipa hin sepai lhom chabou aneitan, sakol touthem mi som nga val bep le kangtalai som khat ham toh, tol sepai sang som bou aneitai; ijeh-inem itileh Syria lengpa’n asuh gam soh a, changphola leivui kisep ngimhel banga akoi ahitai.
Jeho’ahaz thilbol, anatoh adang dang athilbol jouse, athahatna chengse toh aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Chuin Jeho’ahaz jong chu apu apate toh akijam khomin, mihon Samaria khopia avuitauve; chujouvin achapa Joash chu ama khel’in lengvaipon ahung pang pai tai.

Judah lengpa Jo’ash leng chan kal kum som thum le kum sagi lhin kumin Jeho’ahaz chapa Jeho’ash kitipa hin Samaria Israelte chunga lengvai ahinpo panin, kum som le kum gup sungin lengvaipon anapangin ahi,

Ama jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng bou anabol jin ahi; Nebat chapa Jerobo’m in Israelte achonset sahna, hiche Jerobo’am chonset chengsea kon hin akiheidoh deh poi, hiche achonset chengse joh chu ajui jon ahi.
Jo’ash natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chengse, Judah lengpa Amazi’ah toh akisat a athahatna aboncha chu Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Chuin Jo’ash jong chu apu apate toh akijam khomin, chule achapa Jerobo’am kitipa chu ama laltouna ahung tou pai tai. Jo’ash hi Samaria khopia Israel lengte lah a akivui tan ahi.

Elisha hi athina dinga ahung nat phat’in Israel lengpa Jo’ash kitipa hi ama vedin achesuh-in ahi; Jo’ash hi Elisha henga akap jah jengin, apengin hitin aseiye, “Vo hepa, hepa! Israelte kangtalai jouse leh sakol touthem sepai jouse pi chu!” tia aka phat’in,
Elisha’n jong ajah a, ‘Thalpi khat le thalchang phabep gakilah tan,” ati; hijeh chun amanjong thalpi khat le thalchang phabep khat akilah tai.
Hichun Elisha’n Israel lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Thalpi kisadoh temin” atia ahileh; aman jong akisadoh tai. Hichun Elisha’n jong lengpa khut teni chunga chun ama khut teni ajamin,

chuin aseitai, “Niso lam a bangkot chu hongdoh tan,” atia ahileh; aman jong ahongdoh tai. Chujouvin Elisha’n jong, “Kap’in” atileh; aman jong akap tai. Hichea hin Elisha’n aseitai. “Hiche Pakai thalchang, Syria mite chunga galjo na ding thalpi chang, Pakai galjona chu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nangman Syria mite chu nakisat pia, Aphek kiti laiya chu amaho nasuh gam hel kahsea nasat sat jeng ding ahi,” ati.

Chuin Elisha’n asei kit’in, ‘Thalchang ho kilah kit’in” atileh; aman jong akilah kit tai. Chuin aman Israel lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Hiche thalchang ho hin tol jep temin,” atia ∑ ahileh; aman jong thumvei jen tol ajep’in chuin ahaitai.
