Chuphat’in Pathen mipa chu ahung lung hang jah jeng tan ahileh hitin aseiye, “Nangman nga vei gup vei beh najep ding, chutengleh Syria mite chu nasuh gamhel ding ahibou me, tun thum vei seh seh najep’in Syria mite chu nasuh gamhel ding ahibou me, tun thum vei seh seh najep’in Syria mite chu suh gam din nagoi,” ati.
Elisha jong athitan mihon jong avuitauve. Hiche lai hin Moab mite sepai ahon honin ahung kitol jiuvin kum sunga chavang lai leh gamsung gal ahung bol jiuve.

Hichun mihon mithisa khat hi vuidoh dinga aput pet tah uvin, vetan, Moab mi sepai hon khat amudoh paiyun, akichat jeh uva mithipa chu Elisha lhankhuh sunga ase-lhah khum’ uva ajam manguva ahileh, mithipa hin Elisha gubuh ho chu atoh khah khah chung ahung hingdoh kit’in akeng phang te nin apansan ading doh tai.
Jeho’ahaz nikho laise hin Syria lengpa Hazael chun Israelte anabol genthei lheh jengin ahi.

Ahivangin Pakaiyin Israel mite chu alungset’in, achunguva lainatna aneiyin, Abraham le Issac chule Jacob to akitepna jeh chun Israelte henga akihei kit’in, amaho chuu asumang tapoi; tuni geiyin jong amaho hi ama angsunga konin apaidoh deh chom tapon ahi.
Syria lengpa Hazael jong athitan, ama khel din achapa Ben-hadad chu lengin apang tai.

Hichun Jeho’ahaz chapa Jeho’ash hin Hazael chapa Ben-hadad koma konin masang laiya Hazael’in apa Jeho’ahaz alahpeh khopi chengse anung lahpeh soh keiyin ahi. Ben-hadad hi Jo’ash hin thumvei jen gal a ajoutauvin, Israel khopi jouse anung lahpeh soh keitai.
Israel lengpa Jeho’ahaz chapa Jo’ash leng chan kal kum ni lhin kumin Judah leng pa Jo’ash chapa Amazi’ah kitipa hin lengvai ahinpo panin ahi.
Aman lengvai ahinpoh pat hin akum somni le kum nga bou ahinalaiyin, Jerusalem khopia kum som ni le kum ko sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Jeho-ad’din akitin, amanu hi Jerusalem kho mi ahi.
Ama jong hin Pathen mitmum thilpha jeng anabole, ahinla apu David bangin achonjou deh ppon ahi; apa Jo’ash thilbol tobang bangin abol’in ama natoh jouse anatongin ahinnai.
Khomol dunga doiphung jouse akisumang deh pon, hiche khomol dunga hin mipin kithoina abol jom jingun, gimnamtui jong alhut nam jing jenguve.
Amazi’ah hin leng thanei na anei jou jouvin athanei na hi deh tah-in amang chan, apa that a pang sepai jouse chu athat gamin ahi.

Ahivangin hichea tolthat ho mong mong chate chu athapeh poi, Mose danthu lekhabu kisun dung juiya, “Mi chate jeh a jong achate kithat thei lou ding, mipate jeh a jong achate kithat thei lou ding; mihem hi ama ama chonset jeh a bou thilo cheh ding ahi,” tia kisei dunghui ya abol ahi.
Amazi’ah hin chikhuh phaiya Edom mite sang som jen athat’in, songpi kokhuh jong thahat vangin alan, Jok’theel asahin aminvon, tuni geiyin hiti hin akiminvo jing nalaiye.
Hiche lai hin Amazi’ah chun Israel lengpa, jehu tupa, Jeho’ahaz chapa, Jeho’ash henga sottol mi asol’in amaho chu hitin agaseisah-in ahi, “Hungin lang kimaiton kitet hitin, kipatep hite,” ati.

Ahin Israel lengpa Jeho’ash hin Judah lengpa Amazi’ah henga thu alethot kit’in, “Lebanon lhanga lingphung khat hin Lebanon mol a cedar thing phung kom khat’a hin thu athot’in hitin aseiye,’Nachanu chu kachapa ji dingin neipen,’ tin athumin ahileh, hiche kah hin lingphung chhu ajot pan akengin achon lhun ahitai.

Nangin Edom mite chu najo mong mong ahinan, hijeh a chu nalungthima nangma kichoi sang nahiye. Naminthan naa hin lung lhai jengin lang inmuna kitou thim tan; ajeh chu ipi ding pen anangin mi naphin lung hanga nalhuh loa, nang jong Judah gam jong namah thah lo diu ham?” tin agah seipeh tai.
Amazi’ah hin angaipeh deh tapoi. Hijeh chun Israel lengpa Jeho’ash jong chu akontouvin, ama le Judah lengpa Amazi’ah chu Judah gamsunga Bethshemesh kiti galmuna chun kimaiton akisat lhon tai.
Israelten Judah te ajouvun, Judah mite chu ama ama inlam cheh a ajamsoh keitauve.

Chuin Israel lengpa Jeho’ash hin Judah lengpa Ahazi’ah tupa, Jeho’ash chapa, Amazi’ah chu Beth-shemesh galmun chun amanin, Jerusalem ahung kitol paiyin, Jerusalem pal jong chu avochimin, Ephraim kelkot a pat inning kelkot phung geyin tong ja li jen pal kigen chu avochimdel jengin ahi.

Chule sana danka jouse akichomin, Pakai houin sunga um leh bel jouse toh lengpa thil kholna innsunga thilheo jouse jong akichomin, numei thil chinga pangho geiyin amanin, chujouvin Samaria khopi lang ahung kile kit tai.

Jeho’ash natoh lehthilbol adang dang jouse, atoh doh chense leh athahat na jouse, itobanga Judah lengpa Amazi’ah toh anakisat ham, ti hichense hi aboncha Isreal lengte thusim lekhabua kigih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Chuin Jeho’ash jong hi apu apate toh akijam khumin, Samaria khopi chun Israel lengte lah ah akivuitai, chujouvin achapa Jerobo’am kita pan ama khelin lengvai ahin po pantan ahi.
Israel lengpa Jeho’ahaz chapa Jeho’ash thi nungin Judah lengpa Jo’ash chapa Amazi’ah kitipa chun kum som le kum nga ahing nalai in ahi.
Amazi’ah natoh thibol adang dang aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?

Jerusalem khopia chun mihon Amazi’ah thaa lengmun lahpeh ding agouvin, hijeh chun ama jong Lachish khopi lam a ajamtai. Ahivangin mihon Lachish kho geiya ama nung del din mi asol’uvin, Lachish khoa agathat den tauve.
Mihon Amazi’ah chu athilong damsa sakol chunga ahinpouvin, David khopi Jerusalem khoa chung apu apate toh avuitha taove.
Hichun Judah gam miten Azariah kitipa, kum som le kum gup bep hinalai gollhang khat chu aman uvin, apa Amazi’ah khel din lengin apansah taove.
Lengpa thi nunga Elath khopi Sapha kit’a Judah mite dinga semdoh kita chu ama hi anahi, Lengpa chu apu apate toh kivui tha ahitai.

Judah lengpa Jo’ash chapa Amazi’ah leng chan kal kum som le kum nga lhing kum in Israel lengpa Jo’ash chapa Jerobo’am hin Samaria khopia lengvai ahinpo panin, kum som li le kum khat lhingset lengvaipon ana pang e.
Jerobo’am hin Pakai mitmun thise jeng anabol e; Nibat chapa Jerobo’am in Israel te achonsahna, hiche Jerobo’am chonset chengsea kon hin ama jong kihei doh deh pon ahi.

Pakai Israel Pathenin Gathe-hepher khoa mi Amittai chapa Jonah themgao alhachapa kama anaseisa athusei dungjuiyin, Jerobo’am hin Isrealte gamgi akeh ben Hamath kotphunga pat Arabah chan geiyin gamgi asempha soh keiyin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Israelte genthei hesoh chung nung tah a akibol nao chu Pakaiyin amutan, Isreal kithopi dingchun mihem khat; a khat jeng chajong, chamlhat hihen lang soh hijongleh abeihel ahitai, koimacha aum ta poi.
Ahivangin Pakaiyin vannoi leiset’a; kona Israel min kasuh mang ding ahitai, tia anasei khah loujeh-in, amaho chun Jo’ash chapa Jerobo’am amangin anahuh doh tai.

Jerobo’am natoh athilbol, atoh doh adang dang, athahatna chense ahin, itobanga gal anasat a, Judah gamsunga Damascus khopi leh Hamath khopi chu itobanga Israel dinga alahpeh hitam, ti a aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kigih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Chuin Jerobo’am jong hi apu apate toh akijam khumin, Isreal lengte toh akivui tha tai, chujou vin achapa Zechariah hin ama khelin lengvai apotai.
Isreal lengpa Jeroboam leng chan kal kum som ni le kum sagi lhinin kumin Judah lengpa Amazi’ah chapa Azari’ah kitipa hin lengvai ahinpo pantai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan in Azari’ah hi akum som le kum gup seh bou anahi, chujouvin kum som nga le kum ni jen Jerusalem khopia lengvai ana pon ahi. Anu min Jecoli’ah akitin, Jerusalem khosung mi ma ma ahi.
Ama hin apa Amazi’ah chonna bangin in Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabole.
Ahinla khomol dunga doiphung jouse chu khat cha jong asumang deh poi; hiche khomol dunga hin mipin kithoina abol jing jenguvin, gimnamtui jong alhut nam jeng nalaiuve.

Chuin Pakaiyin lengpa Azari’ah hi adengin ahileh athi ni geiyin miphah in aumden tai, aphah jeh hin inchom beh khat; achensah in achengin ahi. Chule lengpa chapa Jotham chun insung pumpi apon, gamsung mite jong vai abolpeh in ahi.
Azari’ah natoh athibol adang dang, atoh doh jouse aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kigih lut soh keiya hilouham?
Chujouvin Azari’ah jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, mihon David khopia apu apate toh avuitha taovin ahi, amakel’in achapa Jotham chu lengvaipon ahung pang pai tai.
Judah lengpa Azari’ah lengchan kal kum som thum le kum get lhinkumin Jerobo’am chapa Zachari’ah kitipa chu lha gup sungin Samaria khopia Isreal chunga lengvaipon anapange.
Ama jong hin apu apate chona bang bangin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in, Nebat chapa Jerobo’am in Isrealte achonset sahnan hiche chonset chengsea kon chun akihei mang deh poi.
Chuin Jabesh chapa Shallhum kitipa chun Zachari’ah lengmun achun, hijeh chun Ibleam kiti laiya hin asat lumin, athat pai paiyin, chujouvin ama khel’in lengvaiapon apang tai.
Zachari’ah natoh athilbol adang dang jouse, vetan, aboncha Isreal lengte thusim lekhabua kigih lut soh keiya hilouham?
Pakaiyin Jehu athutepna chu hiche hi ahi, “Nachate chu khang li chan geiya Isreal laltouna hung tou jing jeng deu ahi,” ati ahi. Hiti hin ahung gui lhungin akichai soh tai.
Judah lengpa Uzzi’ah lengchan kal kum som thum le kum ko lhin kumin Jabesh chapa Sallum hin lengvai ahinpo panin, lhakhat seh seh Samaria khopia lengvai anapoi.

Hichea hin Tirzah khoa pat’in Gadi chapa Men’ahem kitipa chun ahung kontouvin, Samaria khopia ahungin Samaria khopia chun Jabesh chapa Sallum chu asat lhum jengin, atha nungin amakhel’in lengvaipon apang tai.
Sallum natoh athibol adang dang, lengmun achu athusim, vetan, aboncha Isreal lengte thusim lekhabua kigih soh keiye.

Hiche lai hin Men’ahem kitipa hin Tappuah kho achomin, agamsunga cheng jouse chu Tirzah khoa pat’in aban banin achompeh jenge; ijeh-inem itileh amiho hin ama alutsah loujeh-u ahi; hijeh chun ama agamsung achomgam sit set jengin, asunga cheng numei gai jouse jong agai akhepeh soh keiye.
Judah lengpa Azari’ah lengchan kal kum som thum le kum ko lhin kumin Gadi chapa Men’ahem chun Israelte chunga lengvai ahinpo panin, Samaria khopia chun kum som sungin lengvai anapoi.
Men’ahem hin Pakai mitmun thise jeng anabol’in ahinkho lhum keiyin Nebat chapa Jerobo’am Israelte achonset sahnan, hiche Jerobo’am chonset chense kon in kiheidoh deh pon ahi.

Hichun Assyria lengpa Pul kitipa chun Israel gamma galsat ding ahung kontai; hijeh chun Men’ahemin jong Pul chu dangka talent sang khat jeng’in, lengthaneina chu atuh den den theina dinga kithopi tei tei din aga-ngeh tai.

Hiche sum hi Men’ahemin Isrealte lah akona adondoh a, mihao ho koma kona alahpeh a, mi khat’a kona dangka sekel som nga ngaa adon ahin’hitia adondoh chasun hi Assyria lengpa peh dia abol ahi. Hitobanga abol phat chun Assyria lengpa jong kinung le kit tan, Isreal gamsunga aum den den tapoi.
Men’ahem natoh athibol, adang dang atoh doh chense, aboncha Isreal lengte thusim lekhabua kigih lut soh keiya hilouham?
Chuin Men’ahem  jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, achapa Pekahi’ah kitipa chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Judah lengpa Azari’ah leng chan kal kum som nga lhin kumin Men’ahem chapa Pekahi’ah kitipa hin Samaria khopia Isrealte chunga lengvai ahinpo panin, chujouvin kum ni sungiin lengvai apoi.
Ama jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabole; Nebat chapa Jerobo’amin Isrealte achonnset sahna, hiche Jerobo’am chonset chengsea kon hin jong akihei deh pon ahi.

Chuin asepai lamkaipa, Remali’ah chapa Pekah kitipa chun Gilead kho mite som nga jen toh ahung kithouvin lengmun achun, Pekahi’ah kitipa hi Samaria khopia, leng inchung sang sunga athat denin, ama  atha jou phat’in Pekah chu ama khel din lengvaiponn apang pai tan ahi.
Pekahi’ah natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chense abonchan Isreal lengte thusim lekhabua akijih lut soh keiyin ahi.
Judah lengpa Azari’ah leng chan kal kum som nga le kum ni lhin kumin Remali’ah chapa Pekah hin Samaria khopia Isrealte chunga lengvai ahinpo panin, chule kum som ni sungin lengvai anapoi.
Ama jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabole; Nebat chapa Jerobo’amin Israelte achonset sahna, hiche Jerobo’am chonset kon hin akiheidoh deh poi.

Israel lengpa Pekah lengvai poh lai hin Assyria lengpa Tig’lath-pile’ser kitipa chun ahung konin Ijon kho le Abel-beth-ma’acah kho toh, Jano’ah kho toh, Kadesh kho toh, Hazor kho toh, Gilead toh chule Galilee kho chutoh, kho hijat hi Naph’tali gamsunga alasoh tai; akho mite chu Assyria gam lama soh chang din akai mangtan ahi.

Chujouvin Elah chapa Hoshe’a kitipa chung Remali’ah chapa Pekah lengmun achun, Pekah chu asat lum jengin athat tai; hiti chun Uzzi’ah chapa Jotham leng chan kal kum som ni lhinin Hoshe’a chu Pekah khel’in lengvaipon ahung pang tan ahi.
Pekah natoh athilbol, adang dang atohdoh chengse chu, vetan, abonchan Israel lengte thusim lekhabua akijih lut soh keiyin ahi.
Israel lengpa Remali’ah chapa Pekah leng chan kal kum ni lhin kumin Judah lengpa Uzzi’ah chapa Jotham chun lengvai ahinpo panin ahi.
Jotham hin lengvai ahinpoh pat chun akum kum som nii le kum nga alhing tai, chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som le kum gup sungin lengvaipon anapange. Anu chu amin Jeru’sha akitin, Zadok chanu ahiye.
Apa Uzzi’ah chonna bang bangin ana jong hin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabole;

hijongle la khomol dunga doiphung jouse chu asubei deh pon ahi; hiche khomol dunga doi phung dunga hin mipi akithoi thoi nalaiyuvin gimnamtui jong alhutlhut nalaiyuve. Jotham hin Pakai houin sah lam kelkot hi anaboldoh-in ahi.
Jotham natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chengse abonchan Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Hiche laiya hi Pakaiyin Syria lengpa Rezin leh Remali’ah chapa Pekah hi Judah gama gal bol dinga ahinsolji ahi.
Jotham jong apu apate to akijam khomin, apu David khopia chun apu apate toh avuitha tauve; chuin achapa Ahaz kitipa chun ama akhel ding lengvai ahinpon ahi.
Remali’ah chapa Pekah leng chan kal kum som le kum sagi lhin kumin Judah lengpa Jotham chapa Ahaz kitipa chun lengvai ahinpo pantai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan hin Ahaz hi akum som ni alhingtai, chujouvin jong Jerusalem khopia kum som le kum gup sungin lengvai anapoi. Apu David chonna bangin, ama jong hin Pakai a-Pathen mintmun thildih jeng anabole,

hijongle lah ama hin Israel lengte nung ajuui kit tai. Ama hin achapa jeng jong kithoi nan amangin meiyin agouvame, hitobang chun thet umtah-in anachon jengin, Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga adel mangsa namtin vaipi ho chonna bang bangin abol jenge.
Chutengle khomola doiphung dunga chun kithoina abol jin, gimnamtui alhut jin lhang dung jouse leh thing nadum noi tin a hiti hin anabol’in ahi.
Syria lengpa Rezin le Israel lengpa Remali’ah chapa Pekah chu galbol Jerusalem kisat pi din ahung kon lhon tai; hiti hin ama nin jong Ahaz lengpa chu aum lhonin ahileh, ajou deh lhon tapoi.

Hichepet hin Edom lengpan jong Elath kho chu Edom dingin aladoh kit’in Elath khoa konin Judah miho chu ahindel jamin, chule Edom mite chu Elath kho ahung lhung taove; amaho hi tuni geiyin achen dan tauvin ahi.

Hichea hin Ahaz kengpan Assyria lengpa Tir’lath-pile’ser henga sottol mi asol’in hitin agasei sah tai, “Kei hi nangma lhacha pang kahin, nachapa kahiye. Hung kontouvin lang, tua gal a eibol te ni Syria lengpa khut’a konin neihuh don tei teiyin,” ati sah tai.
Ahaz hin Pakai houin sunga kikhol dangka le sana jong alan, lengpa thil kholna sung um jouse jong alan, Assyria lengpa peh ding thilpeh chu athot tai.

Hiche hin Assyria lengpa Ahaz taona asanpeh-in, Assyria lengpa chu Damascus khopi sat din ahung kitol tou jengin ahileh, ajou pai jengin, alah phat’in amite Kir kho langa soh chang din akai mangin, Rezin jong athat tai.

Ahaz lengpa hi Tig’lath-pile’ser Assyria lengpa toh kimuto  dinga Damascus khopia ache chun Damascus khopia maicham chu ahinmudoh tai. Chuin Ahaz lengpan jong Uri’ah thempupa henga hiche maicham lim, akigondol, akisem bang bangin bulhinset’in abol’in agah thot tai.

Hiche chun Uri’ah thempupan jong hiche maicham lim bang hin maicham khat asemin ahi; Damascus khopia ahinthot bang bangin Uri’ah thempupan maicham chu asemin, Ahaz lengpa chu Damascus khopia kona ahung lhun masanin anasem jou tai.
Damascus khopia kona lengpa ahung lhun phat’in lengpan jong maicham chu ahung lhun phat’in lengpan jong maicham chu phate chan aven ahi. Chuin lengpan maicham chu anailut paiyin, achung akaldoh tai,
chujongle pumgo thilto agouvin, lhosoh thilto jong agouvin, donthei lengpitwi thilto jong chu achunga sung lhai; chutengle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha thisan chu maicham chunga athe-nat’in ahi.
Ahaz chun sum-eng maicham Pakai angsunga kitungpa chu houin maiya kon, ama maicham le Pakai houin kikah a konin atoldoh paiyin, ama maicham sah lam a chun atungin ahi.

Hichun Ahaz lengpa Uri’ah thempupa chu aseipeh-in hitin ati,“Hiche maicham lengpa chunga hin jingkah lama pumgo thilto jong lengpa hintodoh pumgo thilto jong, alhosoh thilto jong, chule gamsunga mipin pumgo thilto jouse leh alhosoh thilto jouseu jong donthei lengpitwi thilto atou jong govam nan mangin; chujongle achunga hin pumgo thilto gantha thisan jouse leh kilhaina gantha thisan the-khum ji jin; sum-eng maicham vang khu keiman phunsan nan mang nange,” ati.
Lengpa Ahaz chun aseipeh bang bangin Uri’ah thempupa hichengse chu aboltai.

Ahaz lengpan akitunna avelkol chengse chu aphe-lhan, hichea kon chun kisilna kong chu atoldoh paiyin, anoiya kidinsah sum-eng bongchal ho chung a konin twikong chu adom lhan, chuin songko kam khat’a akoitai.

Assyria lengpa toh aki khutjop jeh chun, Ahaz lengpan leng inpia kisa cholngah nikhoa lampi lima man dia insung lama kisem chuleh, lengpa dinga polama kelkot lutna kisem chu Pakai houina konin asubeiyin atoldoh soh tai.
Ahaz natoh athibol adang dang, abonchan Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Ahaz jong chu apu apate toh akivui tha tai; ama khel’in achapa Hezeki’ah chun lengvai ahinpoi.
Judah lengpa Ahaz leng chan kal kum som le kum ni lhin kuma Elah chapa Hoshe’a hin Samaria khopia Israelte chunga lengvai ahinpoh pan ahin, kum ko sungin lengvaipon anapange.
Ama hin Pakai mitmun thilse abol nan, ahivangin ama masang a Israel lengte adang ho tobang lom ahipoi.
Ama kisatpi din hin Assyria lengpa Shalmane’ser chun ahung konin ahi; hichea hin Hoshe’a hin Shalmane’ser lengpa din anoiya alut tan, neochan aumin, kai jeng jong apetan ahi.

Ahingla Assyria lengpa Hoshe’a hi kitah louna, lengmun achunom amu doh kit’in ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ama hin Egypt lengpa So henga sottol mi anasol’in, Assyria lengpa chu kai pelouvin anadou jenge; hitia chu akum kuma abol ahi. Hichejeh hin Assyria lengpan ama hi aknin songkul sunga akhumin kotpi akamden tai.
Chujouvin Assyria lengpan gam tin a gal ahinbol peh-in, akhon nan Samaria khopi ahinpha tan ahi, kum thum sungin khopi chu aum um jenge.

Hoshe’a leng chan kal kum ko lhin kumin Assyria lengpan Samaria khopi alan, Israel mite abonchan Assyria gamsung lama atolmangin, Israelte chu Gozan vadunga Habor vum, Halah khoa jong achensah-in, Mede mite khopi dunga jong achensah tan ahi.

Hitobang thil aso jengna ajeh chu Israel chate achonset’uva Pakai a-Pathenu, Egypt gama Pharaoh lengpa thanei na noiya kona ahinpuidoh pau douna achonset jenguva, Pathen lim kisem thu chom ahoujeh-u ahi;

chujongle Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga adelmangsa namtin vaipi chonna alah uva, amaho chon banga achon jenguva, hitobang chonna phalou Isreal lengten apatdoh ho jong ajop jeh uva hitia hi thil soh ahitai.

Israel chaten Pakai a-Pathenu dou nan guh thim thimin thildih lou jeng anabol’uve. Akhopi jouseuva chun, kho-nga na insang kisa hao kipat kulpi kikaikhum khopi geiyin, khomol dung jousea doiphung akisem soh keiyui;
Lhang vum dung jouse leh thingna dum noi dung jousea doikhum akiphu’uvin, Ashe’rim doi akisem’uve.
Hiche khomola doiphung jousea hin amasanguva Pakaiyin adelmangsa namtin vaipite thilbol bang chun gimnamtui alhut lhut jiuve. Hitobang hin thilse jeng abol’uvin, Pakai aphin lung hang juvin ahi;
Pakaiyin ajah uva aseisa, “Hiche tobang thil hi nabol lou diu ahi.” tia aseisa milimdoi asemthu uvin ahouvui.

Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israel le Judah chu themgao jouse le mitva neijouse kamin aphoh jing jengin, hitin aseiye, “Nachonset nauva konin kihei mang soh keiyuvin lang keima thupeh chengse leh kachondan jouse nit’uvin, keiman napu napateu kathupeh dungjui leh kalhacha pang themgaoho kama kahinsei sah a nahenguva kahinsol bang bangin chon’uvin,” ati.
Ahivangin amanhon angaipeh deh pouvin, apu apateu umchan bang bangin alouchal’uvin ahi, apu apateu Pakai a-Pathenu thusei tahsan lou ho bangin aumuvin ahiye.

Amahon Pakai chonna dan ho jouse anot thap pehuvin, Pakaiyin apu apateu toh anasemdoh akitep jong iman agelpeh pouve, chule amaho aphona agihsalna jong adon pouvin ahi, Jou lle nal a kibol milimdoi kisemthu ho chon bangin chondau hen, tia Pakaiyin aseisa akimvel’uva cheng namtin vaipi ho chon bbang bangin achon tauve.

Hitia hi amahon Pakai a-Pathenu thupeh jouse asuhmil hel’uva acham cham’uva bongnou lim lilhajol milimdoi kisemthu ni jen akisemdoh-uva, chutengleh Ashe’rah doi jong akisem’uva, van loupina jouse ahouvuva, Ba’al ahouvu ahitai.

Chukit leh achateu pasal ho jong numei ho jong kithoina aneiyuva agovam jenguva, gaoo gao jiuva, phun pou asan’uva, Pakai mitmua thilse bol ding mong monga amaho le amaho kiphal doh jeng ahiuvin, Pakai chu aphin lung hang mong mongu ahitai.
Hichejeh a hi Israelte chunga Pakai hatah a lung hanga, amitmua kona amaho hi atol mang ahitai; koima akhen lou ahitan, Judah phung changseh bou umah ahi.
Judah ten jong Pakai a-Pathenu thupeh chengse anit kit deh pouve, Israelte phudoh achon nau bang bangin amaho jong achon kit’uvin ahi.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Israelte chilhah jouse apaidoh sih seh jengin, abolgentheiyin, michomgamte khut’a apedoh-in, amaho chun ama mitmun asuh gamhel kahsen achomsah sah jengin ahi.

Pakaiyin David insunga kona Israel achonbeh a akeh lhah pet chun Israelten Nebat chapa Jerobo’am hi leng achansah uve. Hichea kon hin Jerobo’amin Israelte chu Pakai deiya achon nauva konin adel jamin, chonset nasa tah aboldoh sah tai.
Israel chate chu Jerobo’am chonset nung nunga acheuvin, hiche Jerobo’am chonset changsea kon hin akihei mang tapouve.

Pakaiyin Israel mite chu amitmua kona apaidoh kahsen ahai deh pouvin, Pakaiyin alhacha athemgaote kama anaseisa banga abol kahsen achon chon jenguve. Hijeh a chu Israelte hi agamsunguva kona tuni geiya Assyria gama sohchanga kitol manguva, umden den jeng ahitauve.

Assyria lengpa Babylon gama konin, Cuthah kho le Avva khoa kon, Hamath khoa kon le Sepharva’im khoa konin mihem tampi ahintol’in, amaho chu Samaria khopi dunga chun Israel chate khel’in achensah tai; amaho hin Samaria gamsung alouvin, akhopi dung jousea acheng tauve.
Amaho hi ahung cheng phat laiyuvin Pakai aging pouvin ahou pouve; hijeh chun Pakaiyin amaho lah-a sakei bahkai phabep alha lut peh-in, hiche ho hin mi phabep athapeh tauve.

Hijeh chun mihon Assyria lengpa jah a aseipeh uvin, “Nangman napuidoh a Samaria gamsung khopi jouse nachensah ho khun agamsunga Pathen kihou dan ahepouve; hichejeh hin Pathenin alah uva sakei bahkai phabep alha lutpehin, vetan, sakeii bahkai ho chun miho khu agamsunga Pathen kihou dan ahet loujeh-uvin, athat that jeng tai,” ati pehuve.

Hichun Assyria lengpan thu apen, “Chuti ahileh soh changdia nahin kaimangu thempuho khat chu nung sol’uvin, ama chu che henlang agamsunga chun gacheng ta hen; ama hin agammsunga Pathen houdan gahil ta hen,” ati.

Hijeh chun Assyria miten Samaria khopia kona soh changa akaimang sau thempuho khat chu ahung kit’in Bethel khopia ahung chengin, miho chu itobanga Pathen gin a chule hou ding ham, ti ahung hil’in ahi.

Ahivangin mi ama ama jat cheh chun pathen lim akisemthu cheh uvin, Samaria miten asemsau khomol dunga doiphung dung jousea chun akikoi soh keiyuve, hiti hin ajat jat dungjuiyin ama ama chena khopi cheh a chun doi chom cheh ahouvui.
Babylon gama hungkon mihon Succoth-benoth doi akisem’uvin, Cuth gama hung kon mihon Nergal doi akisem’uvin, Hamath gama hungkon hon jong Ashi’ma doi akisem uve;

chule Avva gama hungkon mihon chun Nibhaz doi le Tartak doi akisemuvin ahi; chutobang chun Sepharva’im gama hung kon miten jong Sepharvaim mite doi te ni Adram’melech leh Anam’melech chu ahouvun, hichedoi te ni henga hin achateu kilhainan aneiyun agouvam jiuve.

Amaho hin Pakai jong vang aginginguvin, hijeh chun alah uva konin mitin mitang lah a chun thempu tamtah alhengdoh uvin, khomol dung tin a doi phung dung jousea chun amahon kithoina le kilhaina jeng abol jenguvin ahi.
Hitobang hin amahon Pakai ahouvun, ahivangin la ama doi cheh jong akihouvun, ahung kitoldoh nauva agamsung mi chonna bang bang chunn achon soh keiyuvin ahi.

Tulai gei hin masanga achonnau bang bangin achon nalaiyun ahi. Amaho hin Pakai ahoupouve, chonna dan jouse leh chondan jouse jong anit pouvin, Jacob chate Pakaiyin Israel asah a aminvopa chate dinga danthu apeh le athupeh jong chu ajui pouvin ahi.

Hichun Pakaiyin amaho chutoh kitepna khat asemin hiti hin amaho chu thu apetai, “Nang hon pathen lim semthu achom chom nahou lou diu, hitobang ho koma jong chu nang ho le nang ho naboh khup’uva, ahouna kin jong nabol lou diu, akom’uva jong nakilhai lou diu ahi;

nang hon Pakai jeng bou bou nahouvu va, nagin diu, athahat jedoh a aban thahat vanga Egypt gamsunga kona nahin puidoh pau chubou nahou diu ahi; hiche Pakai koma chubou nang ho le nang ho naboh khup’uva, chule ama koma chu kilhaina nabol dingu ahi.

Chujongle aman nang ho dinga asutdohsa chondan jouse le chonna dan jouse chule danthu chengse chu phat jousea nanit jinguva naboldoh jing jeng na diuva nachih thei diu ahi. Nanghon Pathen lim semthu achoom chom nahou lou diu,
nangho to kakitepna hiche kitepna chu nasuhmil thei louhel diu ahi. Nanghon pathen lim semthu achom chom nahou louhel diu,
Pakai na Pathenu ama seh seh bou nahou deu ahi, chutileh aman agalteu khut’a kona jong nahuh doh tei tei diu ahi,” ati.
Ahivanginla amahon ngaisah-in anei peh pouvin, masanga achon ngai ngai banguvin achon jom jinguvin ahi.
Hiche namtin vaipi ho hin Pakai jong ahovun, amaho hou lui milim kilhajol ho jong ahouvui; achateu le atuteuvin jong apateu chonna bang bangin abol’uvin, tuni gei hin hiti hin abol nalaiyuve.
Israel lengpa Elah chapa, Hoshe’a leng chan kum thumin Judah lengpa Ahaz chapa Hezeki’ah hin lengvai ahinpo pantai.

Lengvai ahinpoh pat hin Hezeki’ah kitipa hi akum kum som ni le kum nga bou ahinalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som ni le kum ko sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Abi akitin, Zechari’ah chanu anahi.
Apu David bangin ama hin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol’in ahi.

Khomol dunga doiphung asumangin, doikhom jouse jong avobong soh keiyin, Ashe’rah doi jong aphuh lhutai. Mose’n sum-eng gul lim doiya asem jong chu ama hin avogoisel jengin ahi, ijeh-inem itileh hiche lai geiya hi Israel chaten hiche gul lim kisem koma hi killhaina abol’uva gimnamtui alhut lhut nah laiyu ahi; hiche gul lim kisemthu hi Nehsuh’tan akiti.
Hezekiah lengpa hin Pakai Israel Pathen athah sanin, ama masanga hihen lang amanunga mite lah a hijong leh amatobang Judah lengte mihem khat cha ana umkhapoi.
ijeh-inem itileh ama hin Pakai jeng akolchah jing jengin, Pakai ajui jing in adalha khapoi; Pakaiyin Mose athupeh hiche athupeh chengse chu Hezeki’ah hin anit soh keiyin ahi.
Hijehchun Pakaiyin jong ama apanpi jing in, avaikona chana jong ahamphai; Assyria lengpa jeng jong adouvin, ama noiya alut pon, akin jong abolpon ahi.
Hezeki’ah hin Philistine te chu asat gam in, Gaza khopi geiyin asat peh jengin, agamsung dung jong ajouvin, kho-nga na insang kisa a pat kulpi kikaikhum khopi geiyin ajouvin ahi.

Israel lengpa Elah chapa Hoshe’a lengchan kal kum sagi lhin kum, Hezeki’ah lengchan jou kum li lhin kumin, Assyria lengpa Shalmane’ser kitipa chu Samaria khopi dou din ahung kontouvin, akhopi chu aumtai;
kum thum sungin aumin ahileh Samaria khopi chu alathai; Israel lengpa Hoshe’a leng chan kal kum gup lhin kumin Samaria khopi chu Shalmane’ser chun alatan ahi.
Assyria lengpa Israelte chu Assyria gamsung lama akaimangin, abonchauvin Gozan vadung a Habor vuma Halah khopia achensah-in, chuleh Medi mite khopi dunga jong achensah-in ahi;

hitia abolna jeh hi Israelten Pakai a-Pathenu thusei angai dauva, kitepna asuh keh peh-uva, Pakai lhahchapa Mose thupeh chengse geiya apal keh jeh uva hiti ahi; hiche ho hi ngaisah-in jong anei pouvin, athun jong anung deh pouve.

Hezeki’ah lengchan kal kum som le kum li lhin kumin Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib kitipa chu Judah gamsunga kulpi kikai khum khopi leng jouse sat din ahung konin ahileh, abonchan ajousoh keiyin alasoh tai.

Chuphat’in Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah hin Lachish khopi geyin Assyria lengpa henga mi asol’in hitin aga sei sah tai, “Keiman kabol khel ahitai, keima koma kon in kinung tol kit’in lang, epi pi jongleh nangman neipoh sah pen pen chu katingpigua kapoh jeng ding hitante,” agatisah-in ahi. Hichun Assyria lengpa Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah henga chun dangka talent ja thum le sana talent som thum angeh tai.
Hijeh chun Hezeki’ah jong chun Sennach’erib hi Pakai houin sunga kidongsa dangka jouse le lengpa in thil kholna in a kiholdoh jouse chu abonchan apetai.

Hichepet a hi Hezeki’ah hin Pakai houin kotpi tomna kinei danka jouse le kotpi jousea kiloi danka ho chu aboncha akho-lhah soh hel’a Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah amatah in anabola aloisa chu anung kho-lhah a Assyria lengpa chu apeh ahitai.

Assyria lengpan sepai lamkai lenpen pa leh nukiso sepai alamkaipa chutoh Lachish khopia pat Jerusalem khopia Hezeki’ah lengpa henga asol’in ahi. Amaho hi ahunguvin Jerusalem ahung lhung tauve. Ahunguvin ponsop pa lou lampi, tuikul sah nungjoa chun adinguvin ahi.
Amahohin lengpa ahinkou phat’uvin insung vaipoa pang Hilki’ah chapa Eli’akim le lekhasuna pang Shebnah toh, thuchinga pang Asaph chapa Jo’ah chutoh ahunguvin ahi.
Hichun Assyria lengpa juhai dom lamkaipan aseyin, ajah uva, “Hezeki’ah jah achun seipeh tauvin, ‘Assyria lengpa, leng lengpen hitin aseiye: “Epi pena kisonga hibang a lung ngama um nahim?
Thu kisei mai mai hi gal bolna panmun pha leh thahatna dan a nagel ham? Tua hi nagin koipen nason a koichung pen a ki-ngai nahim? Hitobang tah a keima douna nagin thil nabol ngam jeng pi hi?

Vetan, tua hi nangma Egypt mite chunga kisong nahin, hiche Egypt mite khu peng thenggol kiheh bongsa tobang ahibouve, koi koi hijongle achunga ki-ngai jouse chu akhut sutvang peh thei ahi. Egypt lengpa Pharaoh kitipa chu hitobang hi ahije.

Nangin keijah a hi “Keiho hi Pakai ka-Pathenu chung a kisong kahiuve,” nati dingla, Hezeki’ah kitipa hin khomol dunga doiphung jouse jong asuh manga, Judah te le Jerusalem khopi jah a aseiya hitia hi atia, “Nang hon hiche Jerusalem khopia maicham phunga bou hi chibai naboh diu ahi,” tia aseisa hilou ham?
Tun hungin lang kapu Assyria lengpa toh hung kitet lhonin, “Keiman achunga tou ding sepai nanei pova ahileh sakol sang ni napenge,” ati.
Chuti ahileh nangin kapu sepai lamkai aneopen khat jeng jong chu iti dou jouving nati ham, chutia nangma Egypt sakol kangtalai ho le sakol touthem sepai ho chunga kinem nahileh?

Hiche kalval jong chun keiman kikoma kahung kontouva galbola kahung jeng hi pakai panpi louva nabol ham? Pakaiyin keijah a, “Kontonvin lang, Judah gama gal gabol’in gasu mang tan,” tia kajah a aseijeh a hung kahi,’ tin aseiye,” atiuvin ahi.

Hichun Hilki’ah chapa Eli’akim le Shebnah toh chule Jo’ah chun Assyria lengpa huhai dom lamkai lenpa jah a chun aseiyuvin, “Lungset tah-in Aramiac paovin kajah uva neiseipeh tei teiyun, keihon kahenauve, palvuma pang mipi jah dingin Judah gamsung paovin keiho jah a sei hih beh-in,” tin ajol’uvin ahi.

Ahivangin juhai dom lamkai lenpenpa hin ajah uva asei kit’in, “Kapun thu hijat hi napuu leh nang ho seh seh jah dia seipeh dinga eihinsol beh ham, hiche mipi kulpi sunga tou chet chut, nangho toh manthah tha ding, a-eh kineh a ajuntui kidona mangthah ding ho hin jong ajah ding a aseipeh tan, tia eihinsol hija chu,” atitai.
Hiche a jong chun juhai dom lamkai lenpa chun ogingtah-in asami Judah paovin asei kit’in, “Leng chung nung, Assyria lengpa thusei hi angaiyun:
Lengpan hitin aseiye: ‘Hezeki’ah chu kilhep lhah sah hih-uvin; ijeh-inem itileh ama hin keima khut’a kona nahuh doh jou lou deu ahi.
Hezeki’ah chu mohseh-in Pakai chunga kisong sah dauvin lang hitin seisah dauvin,” Pakaiyin eiho eihuhuguvin tin, hiche khopi jong hi Assyria lengpa khut’a apeh doh lou ding ahi,” tin seisah hihuvin.

Hezeki’ah thusei ngai hih-uvin, ijeh-inem itileh Assyria lengpan hitin aseiye: ‘Keito kichamna sem’uvin lang, kahenga hung doh uvin, chutileh nang ho mi khat cheh chun nangma nangma cheh lengpigui nakilo cheh uva, ama ama theichang phung cheh nakivet diu, nangma nangma twinah phung cheh a twi nakidon diu ahi;

Keiman kahunga nang ho hi kapui manga, nang ho gam tobang bang gamsung, chang phatna gam le lengpithei tha lhina gam, chang nen na gam leh lengpilei tamna gam, olive thing tamna leh khuiju lon na gama kahung puilut’uva chutengleh thilouna naum kahseuva chuti ding ahi. Hezeki’ah thusei ngai dauvin lang, ‘Pakaiyin eihuh doh nauvinte,’ tia asei jouthu hin kipui mang sah hih-uvin.
Namtin vaipi hijat hi apathenin agamsungu chu Assyria lengpa khut’a kona ahuh doh um kha mong nam?

Hamath khoa pathen lim kisemthu ho le Arpad khoa pathen lim kisemthu ho chu hoilamba hitauvam? Sepharva’im kho le Hena kho, chule Ivvah khoa pathen lim kisemthu ho hoiya ba umsoh hitauvam? Hiche ho hin keima khut’a kona Samaria khopi chu ahuh doh mongu hinam?
Gamkai hijat sunga hi apathenu lim kisemthu hijat koipen tah chun keima khut’a kona agamsungu ahuhdoh khah mong a Pakai chun keima khut a kona Jerusalem ahuh doh ding ham?’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Ahivangin mipi chu athip beh jenguvin amapa chu thu cheng khat chan jong adonbut tapouve, ijeh-inem itileh, “Nadonbut louhel diu ahi,” tia lengpan thu apehsa ahitai.

Hichun Hilki’ah chapa insung vaipoa pang Eli’akim le lekha sun pa Shebna toh, thu chinga pang Asaph chapa Jo’ab chutoh Hezeki’ah henga ahung uvin, aponsil jouseu abotal deh duh jeng uvin ahi, chutengle Assyria lengpa juhai dom lamkaipa thusei chengse chu Hezeki’ah henga aseitauvin ahi.
Hezeki’ah lengpan thu kisei chu ajah doh phat’in aponsil abottel jengin, khaodip pon akisil’in, chuin Pakai houin sunga alut tai.
Chuin aman jong insung vaipoa pang Eli’akim le lekah sun a pang Shebna toh, chule thempului chengse chuto khaodip pon jeng akisil sah-in, amaho chu Amoz chapa Isaiah henge a asol tai.

Amaho hin Isaiah jah a aseiyuvin, “Hezeki’ah chun hitin aseiye, ‘Tuni kho hi lung gim nikho, kipho nikho, lung hesoh nikho ahi; naosen apen ding akigon ahivang ahung so-lhah na diu thahat abeitan, akisangdoh jou tapoi.

Hingjing Pathen tot thanghoi dinga Assyria lengpan athupa aju hai dom lamkaipa ahinsola athusei jouse chu Pakai na-Pathenin jong ajahsa hithei mai tante, hiche a hin Pakai Pathenin hiche athujah chense hi abeh lhah thei jong hija ahi; hijeh chun tua athi moh ahing nalai chengse ding hin Pakai na-Pathen henga hung taotemin,” ateuve.
Hitia hi Hezeki’ah lengpa solchah ho chu Isaiah henga ahung phat’uvin,
Isaiah chun ajah uva anaseiyin, “Napuu jah a hitin seipeh uvin, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Assyria lengpa sepaiten keima douna aseiyu hiche athusei ho jeh chun nangman najah teng leh kicha hih hel’in.

Vetan, Keiman ama lung sunga khu lhagao khat kakhumpeh ding, chutengle aman thu kithang khat jah a ama gamsung lam akijut kit ding ahitai; chujou tengleh keiman ama khu ama gamsunga chu chemjam hema alosah tei tei ding ahi,” tin aseiye,’ tiuvin gaseipeh tauvin,” ati.

Juhai dom lamkai lenpa chu ahung kile kit’a ahileh Assyria lengpa chu Libnah khoa gal anabol pet ahung toh khai; ijeh-inem itileh Assyria lengpa chun Lachish kho adalhah Libnah kho asat tai, tia juhai dom lamkaipa chun ajah masa sa ahitai.

Assyria lengpa hin Ethiopia lengpa Tirha’kah chung chang thudol ana jah a, “Vetan, ama chu nang to kisat din ahung kipat doh tai,” ti ajahphat’a, Hezeki’ah lengpa henga hi sottol miho asol kit’a hitia agasei sah ahi,

“Nang hon Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah jah a chu hitia nasei deu ahi: ‘Naki ngaina na-Pathen chu kilhep sah dan lang, Jerusalem hi Assyria lengpa khut’a kipedoh louhel ding ahi, tia athutep chu kinep pi da jengin.
Vetan, nangman gamtin a Assyria lengte chaloh athilbolu hi najahsa ahitai, gam jouse hi asuhgam hel ahitan ahi. Achutileh nangma hi huhdoh a naum jou mong ding hinam?
Namtin vaipi hijat hi apathenu chun ahuhdoh mong hiya, kapu kapaten asuh gamsa Gazan ahin, Haran ahin, Rezeph ahin, Tel-assar a cheng Eden mite ahiuvin apathenuvin ahuh doh nah am?
Hamath lengpa hoiya umta, Arpad lengpa hoiya umtam, Sepharva’im khopia lengpa hoilamba hita a, Hena lengpa hoiya um tam chuleh Ivvah lengpa hoilamba hitam?’ gatiuvin” ati.
Sottol miho khut’a konin Hezeki’ah chun lekah thot chu akilah-in, asimin ahi; chujouvin Hezeki’ah jong chu Pakai houin lama achetou paiyin, Pakai angsunga alekha sut chu aga lhamlhan ahitai.
Hicheahin Hezeki’ah chu Pakai angsunga atouvin asei tai, “Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, vannoi leiset lengam hijat pi dinga Pathen kiti chu nangma nachangseh seh bou nahi; Nangin van le leiset nasem ahi.

Vo Pakai, nanakhang hindon lang kho hin ngaiyin; O Pakai, namit teni hasah-in lang hin vetemin; chuteng le hing jing Pathen tot thangnan dinga Sennach’erib thusei ho hi, ahin thu thot chengse hi vetemin.
Vo Pakai, tahbeh mongin Assyria lengten namtin vaipi hi asuh gam’uva, jouseu jong aneh chaiyu ahitai,

chujongle apau doi apa doi jouseu jong meiya ahalvam peh soh keiyu ahitan ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche ho doi bou ahiuvin, Pathen ahipouve, mihem khutsoh thing le song a pathen lim semthu doi ho hi kisugam soh ahitauve.

Chuti ahijeh chun tun Vo Pakai ka-Pathenu, nahenga katao ahiye, hiche Assyria lengpa khut’a kon hin keiho neihuhdoh tei teiyun, chutihen lang hileh leiset lengam jouse hin, O Pakai, nangma seh seh bou Pathen nahi, ti ahet doh thei diu ahi,” ati.
Amoz chapa Isaiah jong chun Hezeki’ah jaha hitinaseiyin, Pakai Isreal Pathenin hitin aseiye, Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib chung chang thudohlah nangma kahenga nahung taona chu keiman kasang tai.

Ama chung chang thudohlah Pakaiyin thu aseisah chu hiche hi ahiye; “Zion chanu nu-ngah nun namgma donin naneipepoi, aman namgma nahouse jon ahi; Jerusalem chanu chun nangma nunga alu nahi khum khum jeng bouve.
“Koipen ham totna naneiya nahouset chu? Koipentah douna nangma lhangsama nahim? Hitobanga kiletsah tah a khodah a vea nahia, Israel Pathen theng tah douna thusei nahim?

Nasottol miho kamin Pakai natot chavaiyin, hichea hin nangman hitin naseiye, ‘Kakangtalai tampi hi kamangin, molsang vum dung tin ah kakaldoh tai, Lebanon lhang sang lai jousea jong kakaldoh tan, Cedar thing asang pen ho jong kaphuh lhutai; Chah thing hoilai jouse jong kaphuh lhun ahi, Agamla among lam peh geiyin kakholsoh tan, gammang thip lai jouse jong kakholsoh hel tai.
Keiman twikul tampi kalaiyin, hetphah lou gamma twi jong kadonjie; kakengto te ni kalhah a ahileh, Egypt gamma vadung twi jouse akang tai, nati.

“Najah khah loulai hiya, sot laiya kagonsa ahi, hi nahetdoh lou ham? Tulaiya keiman kaboldoh ho hi khanglui laipeh a kagonsa jeng ahitai; Kulpi kikhaikhum khopi jouse jong In-gem lah jeng naso sah ding hi gonsa kakoi ahi.

Akhopi dunga chengte lah athahat, u abei gamtan, alungthoi uvin asuhdong gamtauve hijeh chun jaolah a hamhing beb ahiuvin, hampa nemdih deh tobang ahiuve; Inchung dunga hampa keh tobang ahiuvin, akikhan lhit masangin agop pai jin ahi.
“Ken vang naum thim pet jong kahen navaikon navailhun jong kahenai; Keima douna dinga nalung han pet jong kahei.

Nangin keima douna thu naseijeh chun, Nakiletsahna thusei chu kanabeng te nia ahung lhunge; Keiman nanah hom a thihkoi kabupeh a, Nanephu te ni kah a kamdal kakoipeh ding nahi; Chutengleh nangman nahung galkona lampia chu keiman kanung del mang jel ding nahi.

“Chule nangma dinga amelchihna ding chu hiche hi hi ding ahi. Tukum sunga hi acham chama hung kehdoh muchi ga naneh a, kum ni lhin khum jong leh chutoganga acham chama hung keh doh chuu naneh ding ahi, kum thum llhin kum vang leh muchi natu tua aga nalo ding, lengpilei nabola aga nakilo ding ahi.
Chujou tengleh Judah insung mite athi moh ahingdoh chasun chun ajung akho thuh cheh a, achung lama aga hinsep doh ding ahi;
Ijeh-inem itileh Jerusalema konin athi moh ahingdoh phabeb hung kijot doh ingtin, Zion molsanga kona ahingdoh mi hon khat hung kijotdoh diu ahi, Pakai tom ngai nan hiche hi aboldoh ding ahiye.

“Hichejeh chun Assyria lengpa chung chang thudoh lah Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Ama chu hiche khopia hung lut lou hel ding, thalchang khat jeng cha jong ahin kap lut lou ding, ompho kichoiya khopi maiya jong hung ding lou ding, khopi umna dinga palsang jong akai louhel din ahi.
Ahung galkona lampia chu kinung le kit di ahin, hiche khopi sunga hi hung lut louhel ding ahi,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Ijeh-inem itileh keiman hiche khopi hi kahuh a khuh hing tei tei ding ahi; kei leh kei kakikhohsah jeh leh kalhachapa David khohsah jeh a hitia hi kabol ding ahi,” ati.

Hiche jan, jankhang lai chun Pakai vantil akonin Assyria mite ngahmuna sepai sang ja khat leh sang som get leh sang nga agathat tai; ajing jingkah a miho akithouva avet’uva ahileh, vetan, ngahmun chu mithi long jeng adimset’in ahi.
Chujouvin Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib chu kipatdoh-in ainlama achen, Nin’eveh khopia acheng tai.

Hikoma chun Sennach’erib hin apathen lim semthu adoihou Nisroch leh Adram Adram’melech toh chule Share’zer kiti ho chu ahoupet tah chun, achapaten ama chu chemjamin asat lih-uvin, Ararat gamsunga ajam lut tauve. Ahin ama khel’in achapa Esarhad’don kitipa chun lengvai apotai.

Hiche lai hin Hezeki’ah hi hanat’in anan athipai ding ahitai. Hichun Amos chapa Isaiah themgaopa chu ahenga ahungin ajah a ahung sei tai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Na-insung mite kisem toh tan, ajeh chu nangma damdoh louva nathiden tei tei ding ahitai,’ tin aseiye,” ahung ti.
Chutah chun Hezeki’ah jong hin bang lam aven Pakai henga ataovin hitin aseiye,

“Vo Pakai, neihin sumil hih beh-in, nahenga kahung taove; nangma angsunga itobanga kitah le lungthim keh louhela anachon jing jeng kahiya, chutengle itobanga gunchua nangma mithuma thildih jeng jeng kanabol hitam?” atin ahi. Hiti hin Hezeki’ah chu lhase tah-in akap jah jengin ahi.
Hichung Isaiah jeng jong lhongkim laiya kona apotdoh masangin Pakaiyin ahenga thu ahinsei pai jengin,

“Nung che kit’in lang Hezeki’ah kitipa, kamite chunga leng chapa jaha khun gasei tan, ‘Pakai napu  David Pathen chun hitin aseiye: “Keiman nataona kasang tai keiman nalhi lon kamutai; vetan, keiman nangma kabol dam ding nahitai; nithum lhin ni leh nangma Pakai houin kaiya nache tou ding ahi.

Keiman nahinkho kum som le kum nga kajop be peh ding nahi. Keiman nangma nahin, hiche khopi hi ahin Assyria lengpa khut’a kona kahuh doh a, kei le kei kikhohsah jal leh kalhachapa David kakhosah jal a hiche khopi hi kahuh jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Isaiah jong chun, “Theichanga kisem changlhah pheng khat hinchoiyun lang adamna din anatna maho apom laiya khu nuuvin,” atin ahi.

Hezeki’ah chun Isaiah adongin, “Pakaiyin keima hi eidamsah tei teiyin tin, nithum lhin ni leh kei hi Pakai houin kai din chetou tei tangnge, ti melchih na hetchet na thei chu epi hi ding ham?” atileh;

Isaiah jong chun aseipeh-in ding melchihna chu hiche hintin, Pakaiyin aseisah chu aboldoh mong mong ding ahi, ti hetna chu hiche hi hi ding ahi: Nilim kho kalsom machonbe ding ham, kal som joh nung chon kit ding ham?” atia ahileh;
Hezeki’ah chun adonbut’in, “Nilim ding a kalsom ama chonbe ding chu thil bailam cha bou ahi, kenvang hiche nilim chu kalsom kinung chon kit leh kati ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Isaiah themgaopa jong Pakai henga hataovin ataovin, nisa lim akikhelsah chu kalsom ahung nung chon kitna din ataovin ahileh, Ahaz nunga chonsa chu ahung kihei kit tai.

Hiche lai hin Babylon lengpa Bal’adan chapa Mero’dach-bal’adan kitipa chun Hezeki’ah henga leng palai mi phabep ahinsol’in lekha thot phabep jong ahinpoh sah-in, thilpeh ding phabep jong apohsah-in ahi; ijeh-inem etileh Hezeki’ah dammo thu anajah ahiye.

Hezeki’ah chun amaho hi phatechan alamton, athil kholna a thiljouse jong avetsa-in, dangka ahin, sana ahin, gimnamtui kikhol hojong, thao mantam ho jong, thil kholna kikhol thil jouse jong agal manchah jouse pumin avetsah tai; Hezeki’ah hin hiche leng palai ho avetsah lou thil dang athil dangin, insung a hihen lang gamsunga hijong leh emacha aumtapoi.

Chuphat’in Isaiah themgaopa chu ahung lengpa Hezeki’ah jah a chun ahung seitai, “Hiche miho hin epi aseiuva? Chuleh amaho hi hoilama hung kon mi hiuvem?” atileh; Hezeki’ah jong chun adonbut’in, “Amaho hi Babylon gama kona gamla tah a hung kon ahiuve,” ati.

Hichun Isaiah jong chun asei paiyin, “Amaho hin na-insung epi pi amu uhitam?” atia doh leh; Hezeki’ah jong chun adonbut’in “Amaho hin kei insunga thil um jouse amusoh keitauve; kathil kholna insunga thil um jouse vetsah lou kanei tapoi,” ati.
Chutah chun Isaiah hin Hezeki’ah jah a aseiyin, “Pakai thusei hi ngaiyin:

Vetan, na-insung kikhol thil jouse, napu napaten ahinkhol khompeh tuni geiya kikoi changse hi Babylon gama akipoh mangna ding nikho ahung naitul tul tai; imacha khen kineo louhel ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Nangman nahinsah nachapate phabeb kikai mang ding, amahochu Babylon lengpa leng inpia nukisoa kivul diu ahi,” atitai.

Chuphat’in Hezeki’ah chun Isaiah jah a aseiyin, “Pakai thusei naseichu apha jenge,” ati. ijeh-inem itileh Hezeki’ah chun, “Keima khang a cham alen pou leh ipi aphamo hi ding ham?” tia agel mai ahitai.

Hezeki’ah natoh athilbol adang dang, ahat na jouse jong itobang tah a twikul anasema, twi lam alaiya khopi sunga twi alhoh lut thei ham, ti hiti ho hi aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilouham?
Chuin Hezeki’ah jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, achapa Manas’seh kitipan amakhel’in lengvai apotai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Manas’seh hi akum kum som le kum ni bou alhing bep’e; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia chun kum som nga le kum nga sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu min jong Heph’zibah akiti.
Amajong hin masang Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga adel mangsa namtin vaipi ho chonna thet umtah tah ho chu athon, Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabol’in ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh apa Hezeki’ah chun anasuh mangsa khumol dunga doiphung jouse jong athah semdoh kit’in, Ba’al doi houna din maicham tampi asemdoh kit’in, Israel lengpa Ahab thil bol achona thilbol achona bang chun, Ashe’rah doi jong asemdoh kit’e; chutengleh van loupi na jouse ahouvin, hichengpi chu chibai aboh boh jin ahi.
Pakaiyin, “Jerusalema hi keiman kamin kachen sah ding ahi,” tia aseina Pakai houin sunga jong chun maicham tampi asem doh tai.
Chutengleh Pakai houin lhong te nia jong chun van loupina thil ho houna ding maicham phabep asemdoh in ahi.

Manas’seh hin achapa jong kithoi nan aneiyin meiya agouvam jengin, themka pou adongin, ai-lhim pou abol jin, gaochang miho atah jin, mitphei them ho pou amang chai. Hitihin Pakai mitmun thise tamtah anabol’in, Pakai chu aphin lung hang tai.

Manas’seh hin Ashe’rah doi lim alhahjol chu Pakai houin sungah atung doh jengin ahi, hiche houin thudola hi Pakaiyin David le Solomon jah a hitia hi anasei ahi, “Keiman Israel phung tin lah a kona kalhendoh hiche Jerusalema hiche houin sunga hi atonsot geiya kamin kachensah jing jeng ding ahi;

chule Israelte hin ching thei tah a keiman amaho kathupeh chengse anit’uva, kalhachapa Mose’n amaho athupeh danthu chu ajui them’uva ahipou leh, keiman apu apateu kapehnasa gamsunga kona hi Israelte kal kasondoh sah kit louhel ding kavathaisah louhel ding ahitai,” tia anasei ahi.
Ahinlah Israelten ngaisah-in aneipouvin, chujongleh Manas’sehin amaho ajol lhan, Israel chate masanga Pakaiyin asuh mangsa namtin vaipi ho sangin jong thilse ahabol jouvin ahi.
Pakaiyin alhacha a pang themgao ho konin thu ahinseitai,

“Hitobang tah a Manas’seh Judah lengpa hin hitobang bang thet umtah tah thil anabol dih a, milim doi hijat asemdoh a, Judah gam ahiti chonsetsah jenga ama masanga Amor mite sanga jong khanse joh tah jeh hin,
Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseitai, “Vetan, ajapha chan anakola ngengse khong jeng thilse gilou tah khat Jerusalem khopi chung leh Judah gamsung a kahin lhunsah ding ahi.

Chujongle Jerusalem khopi sunga jong Samaria khopi kate-na thiltena chu kahin jam ding, Ahab insung kate-na songkhai inte-na chu kahin khai ding ahi; chutengle min kong asilngim banga Jerusalem hi kasil ngimsel ding, katheh ngimsela akhup langa kakhup ding ahi.
Hichea hi kagoulo kamite athi amoh ahing chengse jong kapai doh a, amelmateu khut’a kapeh doh ding, amahon kivahna aneiuva, hitia hi amaelmate jouseuvin achomgam gam deu ahi;

ipijeh-inem itileh amahon keima mitmun thilse jeng jeng abol’uvin, keima eiphin lunghang jing jeng uvin ahi; Egypt gama kona apu apateu ahung potdoh nikhouva pat tuni geiya hitia a chon jing jeng ahiuve,” ati.

Hicheng kalval hin jong Manas’seh kitipa hin themona bei mi thisan aso so jeng in, Jerusalem khopi chu khopam lang khat apat alangkhat geiyin hitobang hi adimset jengin, hiche hi Judah achonset sah chun chon a abolbe ahi nalaiyin, hitobang tah hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabol tauvin ahi.
Manas’seh natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chense, chonset aboljouse aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabu kijih lut soh keiya hilouham?
Chuin Manas’seh jong apu apate toh akijam khomin ain mun honsung, Uzza honsunga chun avuitauve; chujouvin achapa Amon chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Amon hi akum kum som ni le kum ni alhing tai; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum ni sungin lengvai apon ahi. Anu chu amin Meshul’lemeth akitin, Jotbah khoa Haruz kitipa chanu anahi.
Apa Manas’seh bang bangin amajong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in ahi.
Apa nung ajuiyin, ama chon chonin achon jengin, apan ahoasa milimdoi kisemthu ho pi chu ahouvin, hiche ho chu chibai aboh jin ahi.
Amon hin Pakai apu apate Pathen chu asumil del tan, hijehchun Pakai chona dana jong ache tapoi.
Chujouvin asepaiten Amon leng mun achuuvin, hitihin lengpa chu ainsunga athat den taove.
Ahinla agamsung mite abonchan akithouvin, amon lengpa lengmun chuho chu athat gamsoh keiyun, chujouvin agamsung miten lengpa chapa Josi’ah kitipa chu lengpa kheldin lengin atung taove.
Amon natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chengse aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Amon jong chu Uzza honsunga ama lhahkhuh kisem sunga chun aki vuitai; chujouvin achapa Josi’ah hin ama khel chun lengvai ahinpotai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Josi’ah hi akum kum get bou ahinalaiye, chujouvin Jerusalem khopia chun kum som thum le kum khat sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu chu amin Jedi’dah akitin, Bozkath khoa Adai’ah kitipa chanu anahi.
Josi’ah hin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol’in, apu David nung nung ajuiyin, achon bang bangin achonin, hitihin jet le veiya jong akihei kon hih hel jenge.
Lengpa Josi’ah leng chan kal kum som le kum get lhin kumin, lengpan Meshul’lam tupa, Ajali’ah chapa Shaphan kitipa, lekha sunpa chu Pakai houin a asol in hitin aseiye,
“Thempu chung nung Hilki’ah henga chetouvin, ama chun Pakai houina hung kitohdoh sum, hongcha in-ngah a pang hon mipia kona adondoh sahu sum chu simtoh soh kei hen;
chujou tengleh asum chu Pakai houin semphatna a natoh vaipoa pang ho khut’a pedoh tahen; amahon asum chu Pakai houin sempha pang natong hochu peo hen,
amaho chu thingthem bol ho leh in sathem ho, thing vaipoa pang ho ahiuvin, chujonle inthil chohna ding le song kaldohna dinga jong man ding ahi, houin semna dinga chu.
Amaho hi mi kitup tah jeh cheh  ahijeh-uvin akhut’uva kipesa kum chu asum jat simtohna hol khoh angaipoi,” ati.
Thempu chung nung Hilki’ah chun lekha sunpa Shaphan jah aseiyin, “Kei man danthu lekhabu chu Pakai houin sunga kamudoh tai,” anati.

Hiche ahin lekha sunpa Shaphan hi lengpa henga ahungin lengpa jah a thu ahung lhut’in, “Nalhachaten sum chu asung lhauvin, Pakai houin a ahung kitohdoh chense chu asuthenguvin, Pakai houin semphatna natoh vaipoa pang miho khut’a abonchan akipedoh soh keitai,” ati.
Chujouvin lekha sunpa Shaphan hin lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Thempu chung nung Hilki’ah chun keima lekhajol khat eipe,” atin, hiti chun Shaphan jong alekhajol chu lengpa angsunga asimdoh tai.
Lengpan hiche lekhajol sunga thu kisei ho chu ajah doh phat’in aponsil abottel jengin ahi.
Chutah chun lengpan themphu chung nung Hilki’ah le Shaphan chapa Ahi’kam toh, Micai’ah chapa Achboi toh, lekha sunpa Shaphan le lengpa lhacha pang Asaiah chu toh thu apen hitin asei,

“Hiche lekhajol kimudoh a kisei thu ho chung chang thudola hin cheuvin lang kei ma chung chang le mipi chung chang, chule Judah gam pumpi thudol umchan ding Pakai henga gakhol toh tauvin; ijeh-inem itileh eiho chunga hung lhung Pakai lungsatna hi anasa behseh jengin ahi;ajeh chu eiho chung chang khankho ding dol hichea kijih dungjui hin ipu ipateu anachon pouvin, hiche lekhajola kisei bang bang hin anit pouve,” ati.

Hijehchun thempu chung nung Hilki’ah le Ahi’kam toh, Achbor le Shaphan chule Asaiah chu themgaonu Huldah henga achetauve; themgaonu hi Shallhum jinu ahin, Shallhum hi Harhas tupa, Tikvah chapa ahin, pon kholna in-ngah a pang ahi, hichepet a hi themgaonu chu Jerusalem khopi vengthah lang a cheng ahi; amaho chu ahunguvin ahung kihoulimpi taouve.
Ahungho jah a chun amanun aseiyin, “Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye: Keihenga nang ho hinsol pa jah a chun seipeh tauvin,
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Vetan, keiman hiche mun le asunga chengte chung hi hiche lekhajol sunga kisum Judah lengpan asimdoh thilse chu kahin lhunsah ding ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh amahon keima eidalhauvin, akhut’uva asemthuu thilsem hoa chu keima phin lung hanga dingin, amahon pathen lim kisemthu achom chom henga gimnamtui alhut’uvin kithoina abol’uve; hichejeh a chu hiche khoomun douna hi kalungsatna hung deujah jeng ding, koiman aphel mit lou ding ahi.

Ahitin Pakai henga thu kholtoh dinga nang ho hinsolpa Judah lengpa jah a chu nang hon akoma hitia nasei diu ahi, ‘Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin thu aseiye; “Nangman najah doh hiche lekhajola thukisei ho chung chang thudola hi,

nangman nalung nakhel theiya, Pakai angsunga nangma nakineosah theiya, hiche khomun douna le asunga chengte douna kathusei ajah a, amaho hi gaosap changa akeohela kijam deu ahi, kati najah doh phat’a naponsil jouse nabottel jenga keima angsung naka jeng jeh chun keiman jong nataona kasang tai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Hichejeh chun neihin vetan, keiman nang hi napu napate toh kajam khoma, hijeh a chu nangma nalhankhuh sunga lung monga nakijam ding, hitobang thilse kabol ding, hiche khomun chung kahin lhunsah ding chu nangman namit te ni a namuphah lou ding ahi,” tin aseiye,’ tiuvin,” ati. Hijeh chun amahon jong lengpa henga thu ahin nung lhut kit taouve.
Lengpan mi kouvin mi asol’in Judah gama upa jouse le Jerusalem kho upa chengse ahung kikhom soh keiyuvin lengpa henga ahung dimset tauve.

Hichung lengpa jong Pakai houin lama achetouvin ahileh, ama nunga Judah mite abonchan akijot’uvin, Jerusalem kho miten ajuiyun, thempuho se se leh themgao jouse jong, mipi alen aneo abonchan akijot tousoh keiyuvin ahi; chutah chun lengpan jong mipi ngai din Pakai houin sunga kimudoh kitepna lekhajol sunga kisun thu kisei jouse chu asimdoh tai.

Chujongle lengpan houin khom phunga adingin, Pakai angsunga kitepna khat asemin, Pakai nung jui jenga, athupeh chengse nit jing jeng ding, ahettohsahna jouse leh achondan jouse chu alungthim pumpi leh ahinkho lhum keiya nit a, hiche lekhajola kisun kitepna thu kisei chengse tohdohna ding chun akitepna chu ajop soh keitauve.

Lengpan Hilki’ah thempu chung nung agol ni lhin na kigol thempu dang dang ho jong, hongchaa in-ngah ho ahiuvin, thu apen, Ba’al houna ding le Ashe’rah houna ding chule van loupina jouse houna ding a um le bel kong le lheng kisem jouse chu Pakai houin theng sunga kona apoh doh kei diu vin aseitai; abonchan Jerusalem khopam lam, Kidron loulaiya meiyin ahalvamin, avutvam jong chu Bethel kho langa atolmang tai.

Chule  Judah lengten milim doi houna dinga thempua anapansah-u khomol doiphung dung jouse, Judah gam khopi jousea jong Jerusalem khopi kimvela jong gimnamtui lhutnam nam jeng thempuho jong chu asubeiyin atolmangin ahi; chujongle koi koi ahiuvin Ba’al houna le nisa, lhathah, ahsite le van loupina jouse henga kithoiya gimnamtui lhutnam jouse jong chu asuh mang thatai.

Chujouvin lengpan Pakai houin sunga konin Ashe’rah doi lim kisem jongchu ahinpo doh kit’in, Jerusalem khopam lam Kidron vadung panga apolut’in, Kidron vadung panga meiyin ahalvamin, avodi sel jengin, chuin avutvam jong chu japi lhankhuh sunga athemang hel’in ahi.
Abanin Pakai houin sunga pasal kijoh notia pang ho chenna in jouse jong aphe-lhan, asumang tai, hiche in dunga hi numei hon Ashe’rah doi houna ding pon akhon jiu ahi.

Chujouvin Josiah lengpan Judah gam khopi jouse thempuho chu ahin kaidoh soh keiyin, thempuhon gimnamtui alhutnam ji nau khomol dunga doiphung jouse jong asuh thangpeh-in asumang tai, hitobanga hin Geba khoa pat Beer-sheba geiyin abol’in ahi; doiphung jouse asumangin, hiche ho chu khopi jotna kelkot phung veilama, khopi vaipoa pang Joshua kelkot kitilaiya lutna kelkot phung jousea kibol ahi.
Ahivangin hiche doiphung dunga thempuho chu Jerusalem khopia Pakai maicham phung geiyin ahung kaltou pouvin, asopi au anao lah ucha cholsolou changlhah akineh uvin aumtauve.
Josi’ah lengpan mi koiman achapa hihen achanu hijongle Molech doi houna dinga atodoh a agovam louhelna din, Hinnom chapate phaileiya To’pheth doiphung jong asuthangin asumang tai.

Chujongle Judah lengten nisa houna aneiyu, Pakai houin a kikoi sakol ho, invel dunga kigol, houin vaipoa pang Nathan-melech indan koma kigol ho jong chu Josi’ah hin alah doh soh keiyin nisa houna kangtalai kisem jouse jong chu meiyin ahalvam tai.

Chule Ahaz indan chungnung insunga maicham kisem ho, Judah lengten anasemu ahin, Pakai houin lhonglai te nia Manas’seh lengpan maicham anasem ho gei geiyin Josi’ah  chun aloi lhun avogoi goi jengin, chuin avutdi jouse jong chu Kidron vadunga agasung lhatai.

Josi’ah lengpan masanga Israel lengpa Solomon semsa Sidon mite hou thet umtah Ash’toreth doi le Maob mite hou thet umtah Chemosh doitoh, Ammon mite hou thet umtah ma Milcom kiti ho, Jerusalem khopam niso lam, lhanglam olive mol lang ngat’a kikoi ho jong chu asuse soh keiyin asuh thang peh tai.
Chule Josi’ah chun doikhom jouse jong aphuh lhun, Ashe’rim jouse jong asat lhusoh keiyin, akhomko dung jouse chu mihem gubuh jengin adip’in ahi.

Hiche kalval jong hin Josi’ah chun Israelte chonset sah pa Nebat chapa Jerobo’amin Bethel khoa doiphung khat tundoh a maicham khat anasemdoh, hiche maicham chutoh doiphung chu akop’in avo-lhun, asong ho gei geyin avogoiyin, agotbong sel jengin vutvam abohsah tai; chujongle Ashe’rah doi jong chu meiyin ahalvam tan ahi.

Hichea hin Josi’ah chu akihei len avet a ahileh molvuma lhankhuh ho chu amudoh tan, chuin mi asol’in lhankhuh dunga mihem gubuh chense chu alahdoh sah-in, abonchan maicham chunga chun meiyin ahalvamin, maicham suh-thang nan abol’in, hitobang thilsoh ding sei masaa Pathen mipan anaphondohsa Pakai thusei dunjuiyin anabol’in ahi.

Chujouvin jong Josi’ah chun mi adongin, “Gal lama lhan kisem tobang khat kagah mu khu epiba ham?” atia ahileh; khopi sung cheng mihon aseipeh-uvin, “Nangman Bethel khopia maicham douna hitobang thil nabol ding jouse hung seidoh masaa Judah gama hung kon Pathen mipa lhankhuh chu ahi,” atipeh-uvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Josi’ah jong chun, “Amapa vang chu chuti tante, koimachan agubuh ho laidoh thei ponte,” ati. Hijehchun mihon jong amapa gubuh hochu laidoh louvin akoi thim taovin Samaria khopia hung kondoh pa themgaopa gubuh chengse chutoh don louvin akoitha tauve.

Kithoina doiphung jouse, Samaria gamsung khopi dung jouse Israel lengten anasemdoh jouseu, Pakai anaphin lunghang na jouseu abonchan Josi’ah hin aladoh soh keiyin, Bethel khopia abolna tobang chun abolsoh keiye.
Hiche doiphung dunga pang thempu jouse jong amaicham chung dunga athat den jengin, hiche maicham chung dunga chun mihem gubuh jeng meiyin agou gou jeng e. Chuin Jerusalem langa ahung kile kit tai.
Josi’ah lengpan mipi abonchauva jah a thu apen, “Hiche kitepna lekhajola kigih bang bang hin Pakai na Pathenuva kalchuh kut mang soh keiyuvin,” ati.
Ijeh-inem itileh Israelte thutana anapang thutan vaihom ho khang laiya pat le Israel lengte khang lai leh Judah lengte khang lai geiya jong hitobang kalchuh kut hi anakimang khalou ahitai;
Josi’ah leng chan kal kum som le kum get lhin kuma bou hiche kalchuh kut hi Jerusalem khopi hung kimang kit ahibep’e.

Josi’ah hin gaochang miho jong asumangin, mitpheldoi them ho jong asubeiyin, indoi le milim doi kisem tapou, Judah gamsung le Jerusalem amudoh thet um thil tapou chu asubei bei jengin, Pakai houin sunga Hilki’ah thempupa ahin mudoh lekhajol sunga kisun Pakai thusei house chu atohdoh thei teina din aboltai.

Josi’ah masangin ama tobang leng, alungthim pumpi le ahinkho lhum keiya chule athahat jouse Pakai jenga ki-ngaiya, Mose danthu kisei ho dungjuiya chon koima ana umpoi; ama nungin jong koima dang ahung umdoh kit tapoi.
Ahinah vangin Pakai chu alungsatna nasa tah, Judah chunga hung deujah jenga kon chun akihei mangdeh hih laiye, ajeh chu Manas’seh kitipan anaphin lung hangna chu lungdam theilou ahitai.

Chujouvin Pakaiyin aseitai,” Keima Israel katolmang banga Judah jong hi keima mitmua kona katolmang ding ahitai, chujongle keima kalhendohsa hiche khopi Jerusalem jong hi, ‘Keima min kachensah jing jeng ding ahi,’ tia kaseina hiche houin pum puma hi kapaidoh ding ahitai,” ati.
Josi’ah natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chense aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?

Josi’ah lengvaipoh lai hin Egypt lengpa Pharaoh Neco kitipa chu Euphrates luipi dunga Assyria lengpa kimupi din achetouvin ahi. Josi’ah lengpa jong chu Neco kimupi din achen ahileh, Pharaoh Neco chun amudoh phat’in Megiddo kiti laiya chun athat dentan ahi.

Chuin asepaite Josi’ah chu Megiddoa konin athisan kangtalai khat’in ahintol’uvin, Jerusalema ahinpo lut’uvin, chuin ama lhan kisemsa chu a avuitauve. Chuin a gamsung mite Josi’ah chapa Jeho’ahaz kitipa chu aman’uvin thao anu’uvin apa khel din lengin apansah tauve.

Lengvaipao ahung pan chun Jeho’ahaz kitipa hi akum som ni le kum thum alhing tai, chujouvin lha thum sungin bou Jerusalem khopia chun lengvai anapoman’e. Anu minchu Hamu’tal akitin, Libnath khao Jeremiah kitipa chanu anahi.
Jeho’ahaz jong hin apu apate chonna bangin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabol’in ahi.

Chuin Pharaoh Neco chun ama hi Jerusalem khopia lengvai apoh mohelna din Hamath gamsunga Riblah kiti laiya chun asomkonin akoitai, chutengleh agamsung a kaidon ding dol chun dangka talent ja khat le sana talent khat apoh sah-in ahi.

Pharaoh Neco hin Josi’ah lengpa chapa Eli’akiam chu apa Josi’ah panmun khel’in lengin apansah-in, amin akhelpeh-in Jehoi’akim asah e. Jeho’ahaz vang chu akai mangin, Egypt gamsunga akailut peh tai, hikom achun amajong athiden tai.

Jehoi’akim hin Pharaoh henga kai kidong dangka le sana chu apejin, Pharaoh thusah ma man sum chun gamsunga adongin ahi. Pharaoh Nico peh dingin aman dangka le sana chu agamsung mite a konin adongin, amichang-in aki-nganse dung bang cheh-in apehsah-in ahi.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jehoi’akim hi akum kum som ni le kum nga alhingtai, chujouvin kum som le kum khat sungin Jerusalem khopia chun lengvai anapoi. Anu minchu Debi’dah akitin, Rumah khoa Pedai’ah kitipa chanu anahi.
Ama jonghin apu apate chona bang bangin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabol’in ahi.

Jehoi’akim lengvaipoh laihin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar kitipa chu gal ahung kontouvin, Jehoi’akim hi kum thum sungin ama soh chun anapang tai; chujouvin Jehoi’akim hi akilehei yin Nebuchadnezzar dou nan gal aboltai.
Hichun Pakaiyin Judah gam suhmang din masang laiya athemgao alhacha pang ho kama anaseisa dungjuiyin Jehoi’akim dou din Chalde’a sepaite, Syria sepaite, Moab sepaite, Ammon sepaite alha lut tai.
Dih tah maonga hiche hi Pakai thusah a Judah gama hung lhunga, amitmua Judahte suh mang din agot’a, Manas’seh chonna athibol chonset chense dungjuiya abolpeh a,
chujongle themona bei miho thisan aso jeh a jong abol ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Manas’seh hin Jerusalem khopi chu mi themona beiho thisan anadip jeng ahitan, Pakaiyin angaidam louhel ding ahi.
Jehoi’akim natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chengse aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lutsoh keiya hilou ham?
Jehoi’akim jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, achapa Jehoi’achin kitipa chun anakhel’in lengvai apotai.
Hiche nunghin Egypt lengpa chu chung galkondoh joutapoi, ijeh-inem itileh Babylon lengpan Egypt lengpa gam jouse alahpeh-in, Egypt vadunga pat Euphrates luipi dung geiyin alatai.
Lengpa ahung pan chun Jehoi’achin kitipa hi akum kum som le kum get bou ahinalaiyin, chujouvin Jerusalem khopia chun lha thum sungin lengvai apoi.
Apa chonna bang bangin ama jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabol’in ahi.
Hichepet hin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar sepaite hung konuvin Jerusalem khopia ahungun khopi chu aum tauve.
Asepaiten anaum pet tah-u hin Nebuchadnezzar Babylon lengpa jong chu Jerusalem khopia ahungin ahi;

chuphat’in Jehoi’ahin Judah lengpa henga ama le ama akipedoh jengin, ama ahin, anu ahin, asepaite ahiuvin, leng chapate jouse ahiuvin, leng inpia natong vaibol jouse jong abonchan akipe doh soh hel tauve. Alengchan kal kum get lhin kumin Babylon lengpa Jehoi’ahin hi soh changin akai mangin,

Pakai houin a thil kibol jouse jong apomangin, lengpa insunga thil kikhol jouse jong akilah-in, Pakaiyin anaseipeh masah bang bangin Israel lengpa Solomon semdoh Pakai houin sunga sana khon jouse umlebel aboncha avokeh gamsoh tai.
Hitihin Babylon lengpan Jerusalem mite abonchauvin akaimang hel’in, gamsunga mivaicha chung nung ho chubou dalhah a um ahiuve.

Nebuchadnezzar chun Jehoi’achin lengpa jong Babylon gama akaimangtai; lengpa nu le ajite jong lengpa dinga vaibol thutan a pang ho ahiuvin, gamsunga haosa jong ahiuvin, abonchauvin Nebuchadnezzar chun Babylon lama din Jerusalema apat soh chang din akaimang soh tai.
Hitihin Babylon lengpan Babylon gamsunga soh sepai jouse chu sang sagi alhingin, thingthem bol le thilkheng them miho chu sang khat alhing uvin, aboncha uva hi mi thahat galsat thei cheh ahiuve.
Babylon lengpa Jehoi’achin pa-ngah pa Mattani’ah kitipa chu Jehoi’achin kheldin lengin apansah-in aminjong akhelpeh-in Zedeki’ah asah tai.

Lenga ahung pan chun Zedeki’ah hi akum kum som ni le kum khat bou alhing nalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som le kum khat sungin lengvai anapoi. Anumin chu Hamu’tal akitin, Libnah khoa a Jeremi’ah kitipa chanu anahi.
Jehoi’akim chona bang bangin amajong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in ahi.

Hichejeh chun Jerusalem khopi le Judah gamsung suhgmangna ding geiyin Pakai lung hang tan, hijeh chun aman jong amitmua konin Jerusalem le Judah gam chu apaidoh tai. Zedeki’ah lengpa hin Babylon lengpa dounan gal ahin boltan ahi.

Zedeki’ah leng chan kal kum ko lhin kum, lhasom na, chuche lha, ni som lhin nin Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar chun asepaite abon chan ahin puiyin Jerusalem asat’in ahung konin khopi chu aum tai; Babylon sepaiten Jerusalem khopi satna ding pal akaiyun, aum um jeng tauve.
Hiti hin khopi chu Zedeki’ah lengchana kum som le kum khat geiyin aum um jeng uvin ahi.
Lha li lhin na, nikho lhin nin khopi sunga nehding akilhasam tan, kel ahahsa behseh jengin, mipi din neh lechah abeitai.

Hichun khopi pal chu themkhat avut vang uvin, janlaiyin lengpa le asepai galsat thei lai jouse ajam doh uvin, khopi kimvela Chaldea mite adimset vanguvin  pal le pal kikah a lengpa honleiya chun ajamdoh tauve. Amaho chu Arabah lang jonin achetauvin ahi.
Ahivangin Chaldea mite sepaihon Judah lengpa chu anung adelpeh uvin ahileh Jericho phaiya apha pa tauve; Hichun lengpa chu asepaiten adalhauvin akithe cheh soh hel tauve.
Chuphat’in Chaldea sepaiten Judah lengpa chu amanuvin Riblah khoa pansa Babylon lengpa henga ahinkai lut’uvin, Babylon lengpan jong achun thu atantai.
Chaldea mite hin Zedeki’ah chapate chu ama mitmun chang tah chun athat’uvin, ama jeng jong thih khaovin akan’uvin Babylon gam langa akaitaouve.

Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar lengchan kal kum som le kum ko lhin kumin, lhanga lhina, chuche lha, ni sagi lhin’nin, Babylon lengpa sepaite lah a lengpa tahsa vetup loi sepai lamkaipa Nebuzaradan kitipa chu Jerusalema ahungin ahi.
Nebu’zaradan kitipa hin Pakai houin jong ahalvamin, lengpa in le Jerusalem kopia in dang jouse jong ahal tai. Hitihin in loupi lai lai jouse ahalvam soh hel’in ahi.
Chujongle hiche lengpa tahsa vetup’a pang sepai lamkai pa puiloi Chaldea sepaite chun Jerusalem khopi kimvela pal kikai jouse avochimsoh hel’uvin ahi.

Khopi sunga kidalha dan mipi chense le Babylon lenpa langa pang miho chuto, chule mipi ahon jama amaho chengse chutoh, chule mipi ahon jama amaho chengse ahiuvin, sepai lamkaipa Nebu’zaradan kitipa hin sohchang din atolmang tan ahi.
Hichea hin sepai lamkaipa hin gamsung mi avaicha dehset hochu lengpilei lhou dingle loubola loukai ding adalhai.

Pakai houin sunga sum-eng khom kiphut hole Pakai houin sunga kilui sum-eng twikong le atuna sum-eng a kisem chengse jong chu Chaldea sepaiten avogoi goiuvin asum-eng chengse chu Babylon lama akipoh tauve.

Chujongle Chaldea mite chu bel jouse le tupheng jouse jong, chaiche ho ahin, gimnamtui halnamna lheng ho ahin, houin kin bolnadinga kisem sum-eng kibol umlebel lheng le kong abonchan akipoh mang tauve;
khangbel hojong khon hojong akipoh tauve. Sepai lamkaipa chun sana jong asanan akilah-in, dangka jong adankan akilah jengin ahi.
Pakai houin a pang dia Solomon semdoh khom teni le twikong le a khom akituna tenia kimang, umlebel lheng le kong a kimang sum-eng chengse chu agihdan kite-jou thei louhel ahi.

Khom khatchu asandan tong som le tong get alhingin, aluvum a chu alutom ding sum-eng akisem cheh ahi; hiche alutom seh seh chu asan dan tong thum alhingin, khut themtah a kijem pah a lencha jem banga a kibol, kolbuthei lim kisem ahin, sum-eng jenga kibola aluvum kimvel a kisemsoh kei ahi. Chule khomni lhina jong chutobanga lencha pheh banga  kipheh ma hi.
Sepai lamkaipa chun thempulen Serai’ah le thempu ni lhin na Zephani’ah kitipa chutoh, hongcha ngah a pangji mi thum chutoh akaimangin;

chujongle khopi sunga konin gal lamkaipa leh akhopi sunga kimandoh lengpa toh khompi mi nga jong akaimang thai; sepaite gamsung mi simtoh lepang alamkai paovin lekhasuna amanpa leh khopi sunga kimandoh mi somgup chutoh akaithan ahi.
Amaho hi mi vetup sepaite lamkaipa Nebu’zaradan kitipa chun Riblah khoa chun Babylon lengpa henga ahinkai lutai.
Abonchau hin Hamath gamsung Riblah khoa chun Babylon lengpan adengin athat soh tai. Hitobang tahin Judah mite chu agamsunguva konin sohchang-din akikai mang soh taove.
Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnezzar adalhah Judah gamsunga cheng den nalaiho chunga pang din Shaphan tupa Ahi’kam chapa Gedali’ah kitpa chu mipi chunga vaipo din apasah tai.

Hiche hin gamlah a thamden mipi hon ahiuvin, chuleh sepai lamkai ho ahiuvin, Babylon lengpan Gedali’ah kipa hi gamvaipon apansah tai, ti ajah doh phat’uvin Mizphah khoa chun sepaite chehtoh ahung kilhon’uvin Ishmael kitipa Nethani’ah chapa le Kare’ah chapa Joha’nan toh, Netoph’ath khoa mi Tan’humeth chapa Serai’ah kitipa toh, ‘Ma’ac’ath khao mi chapa Ja-azani’ah kitipa chutoh Gedali’ah henga ahunguvin ahi.

Hichun Gedali’ah jong amaho le asepaiteu henga aki hahsel’in hitin aseiye, “Chaldea mite vaibola pangho khu kicha hih uvin, gamsunga chenguvin lang Babylon lengpa kinbol’in pang taovin, chutileh nang ho din amathu umponte,” ati.

Ahivangin lha sagi lhin phat’in leng insunga peng mi, Eli’shma tupa, Nethani’ah chapa Ishmael chu ahung konin sepai som khat ahin lamkaiyin Mizpah khoa hin Gedali’ah leh Judah mite toh Chaldea mite umkhom apanpi chengse chu ahung del khum’uvin athat taove.
Chuphat’in mipi abonchauvin aneo alen abonchan akitol’un, sepai lamkai ho pum pumin Egypt gamlanga akitol mang taove; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hin Chaldea mite aginu ahitai.

Judah lengpa Jehoi’achin soh-chan kal kum som thum le kum sagi lhin kum, lha som le lha ni lhin na, chuche lha, nisom ni le ni sagi lhin nin Babylon lengpa Evil-mero-dach kitipa hin ama ahung leng chan kum chun ama hin Jehaoi;achin Judah lengpa hi khuto tah-in songkula konin ahinlha doh jengin ahi.
Chule ama hin Jehoi’achin henga lungsetna neitah-in thu aseiyun, Babylon gamsunga amatoh leng chang khom mi-dang jouse sangin Jehoi’achin toumun lenpen tah apetai.
Chuphat’in Jehoi’achin hin asongkul lutna ponsil chu atolkoitan ahi. Nisheh le ahinkho lhum keiyin lengpa ankoung phunga an anejing jengin;
Chutengle ama lungset man hin Babylon lengpan aphat tinin lungset man sum ape jing jenge, ahinlaisen niseh leh ama aneh ding chan khat akisem jing jeng tai.
